detail_json,\n158\t\t\tcontent='events', content_rowid='id'\n159\t\t);\n160\t\tCREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS events_fts_insert AFTER INSERT ON events BEGIN\n161\t\t\tINSERT INTO events_fts(rowid, type, string is a known type.\n180\tfunc isValidEventType(t string) bool {\n181\t\tswitch t {\n182\t\tcase \"detection\", \"zone_entry\", \"zone_exit\", \"portal_crossing\",\n183\t\t\t\"trigger_fired\", pagination.\n195\t//\n196\t//\tQuery params: limit (default 50, max 500), before (timestamp_ms cursor),\n197\t//\tsince (ISO8601), until (ISO8601), type (single type filter),\n198\t//\ttypes (comma-separated type list for category filtering),\n199\t//\tzone, zone_id, person, person_id, q (FTS5 query), mode (expert|simple).\n200\t//\n201\t// GET /api/events/{id} — single event by /api/events.\n211\ttype eventsResponse struct {\n212\t\tEvents        []*Event `json:\"events\"`\n213\t\tCursor        string   `json:\"cursor,omitempty\"`\n214\t\tHasMore       bool     `json:\"has_more\"`\n215\t\tTotalFiltered int      `json:\"total_filtered\"`\n216\t}\n217\t\n218\t// prepareFTSQuery appends a trailing * for prefix matching if the query\n219\t// doesn't already end with a FTS5 operator character. This enables\n220\t// partial word matching (e.g., \"kit\" matches \"kitchen\").\n221\tfunc prepareFTSQuery(q string) string {\n222\t\tq = strings.TrimSpace(q)\n223\t\tif q == \"\" {\n224\t\t\treturn q\n225\t\t}\n226\t\t// If the query already ends with a FTS5 special character or operator, leave it alone.\n227\t\tlast := q[len(q)-1]\n228\t\tif last == '*' || last == '\"' || last == ')' {\n229\t\t\treturn q\n230\t\t}\n231\t\t// For simple terms (no operators), append * for prefix matching.\n232\t\t// If the query contains FTS5 operators (AND, OR, NOT, NEAR), append * to each\n233\t\t// simple token instead.\n234\t\tif strings.Contains(q, \" AND \") || strings.Contains(q, \" OR \") ||\n235\t\t\tstrings.Contains(q, \" NOT \") || strings.Contains(q, \" NEAR \") {\n236\t\t\t// Has operators — append * to each token that isn't an operator or quoted phrase.\n237\t\t\tparts := strings.Fields(q)\n238\t\t\tfor i, p := range parts {\n239\t\t\t\tif p == \"AND\" || p == \"OR\" || p == \"NOT\" || p == \"NEAR\" {\n240\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n241\t\t\t\t}\n242\t\t\t\tif (strings.HasPrefix(p, `\"`) && strings.HasSuffix(p, `\"`)) || p == \"(\" || p == \")\" {\n243\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n244\t\t\t\t}\n245\t\t\t\tparts[i] = p + \"*\"\n246\t\t\t}\n247\t\t\treturn strings.Join(parts, \" \")\n248\t\t}\n249\t\t// Simple single-term query — just append * for prefix matching.\n250\t\treturn q + \"*\"\n251\t}\n252\t\n253\tfunc (e *EventsHandler) listEvents(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n254\t\t// Parse limit\n255\t\tlimit := eventsDefaultLimit\n256\t\tif s := r.URL.Query().Get(\"limit\"); s != \"\" {\n257\t\t\tif n, err := strconv.Atoi(s); err == nil && n > 0 {\n258\t\t\t\tlimit = n\n259\t\t\t}\n260\t\t}\n261\t\tif limit > eventsMaxLimit {\n262\t\t\tlimit = eventsMaxLimit\n263\t\t}\n264\t\n265\t\t// Parse before cursor (timestamp_ms as string)\n266\t\tvar beforeTS int64\n267\t\tif s := r.URL.Query().Get(\"before\"); s != \"\" {\n268\t\t\tbeforeTS, _ = strconv.ParseInt(s, 10, 64)\n269\t\t}\n270\t\n271\t\t// Parse filters\n272\t\tq := r.URL.Query().Get(\"q\")\n273\t\teventType := r.URL.Query().Get(\"type\")\n274\t\ttypesStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"types\") // comma-separated list of event types\n275\t\tzone := r.URL.Query().Get(\"zone\")\n276\t\tzoneID := r.URL.Query().Get(\"zone_id\")\n277\t\tif zoneID != \"\" {\n278\t\t\tzone = zoneID // zone_id takes precedence over zone\n279\t\t}\n280\t\tperson := r.URL.Query().Get(\"person\")\n281\t\tpersonID := r.URL.Query().Get(\"person_id\")\n282\t\tif personID != \"\" {\n283\t\t\tperson = personID // person_id takes precedence over person\n284\t\t}\n285\t\tafterStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"after\")\n286\t\tsinceStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"since\") // Alias for after\n287\t\tuntilStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"until\") // Upper bound timestamp\n288\t\tmode := r.URL.Query().Get(\"mode\")      // \"expert\" or \"simple\" (default: simple)\n289\t\n290\t\t// Parse and validate types list (comma-separated)\n291\t\tvar typesFilter []string\n292\t\tif typesStr != \"\" {\n293\t\t\tfor _, t := range strings.Split(typesStr, \",\") {\n294\t\t\t\tt = strings.TrimSpace(t)\n295\t\t\t\tif t == \"\" {\n296\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n297\t\t\t\t}\n298\t\t\t\tif !isValidEventType(t) {\n299\t\t\t\t\twriteJSONError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid event type: \"+t)\n300\t\t\t\t\treturn\n301\t\t\t\t}\n302\t\t\t\ttypesFilter = append(typesFilter, t)\n303\t\t\t}\n304\t\t}\n305\t\n306\t\t// Validate event type\n307\t\tif eventType != \"\" && !isValidEventType(eventType) {\n308\t\t\twriteJSONError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid event type\")\n309\t\t\treturn\n310\t\t}\n311\t\n312\t\t// Validate after/since timestamp (prefer since if both provided)\n313\t\tvar afterTS int64\n314\t\ttimeStr := afterStr\n315\t\tif sinceStr != \"\" {\n316\t\t\ttimeStr = sinceStr\n317\t\t}\n318\t\tif timeStr != \"\" {\n319\t\t\tt, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, timeStr)\n320\t\t\tif err != nil {\n321\t\t\t\twriteJSONError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid since/after timestamp\")\n322\t\t\t\treturn\n323\t\t\t}\n324\t\t\tafterTS = t.UnixNano() / 1e6\n325\t\t}\n326\t\n327\t\t// Validate until timestamp (upper bound)\n328\t\tvar untilTS int64\n329\t\tif untilStr != \"\" {\n330\t\t\tt, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, untilStr)\n331\t\t\tif err != nil {\n332\t\t\t\twriteJSONError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid until timestamp\")\n333\t\t\t\treturn\n334\t\t\t}\n335\t\t\tuntilTS = t.UnixNano() / 1e6\n336\t\t}\n337\t\n338\t\t// Person-relevant event types for simple mode\n339\t\t// Simple mode shows only person-relevant events: zone_entry, zone_exit, ZoneTransition, portal_crossing, fall_alert, FallDetected, anomaly, AnomalyDetected, security_alert, sleep_session_end\n340\t\t// Simple mode hides: node_online, node_offline, ota_update, baseline_changed, system, learning_milestone, detection, presence_transition, stationary_detected\n341\t\tsimpleModeTypes := map[string]bool{\n342\t\t\t\"zone_entry\":        true,\n343\t\t\t\"zone_exit\":         true,\n344\t\t\t\"ZoneTransition\":    true,\n345\t\t\t\"portal_crossing\":   true,\n346\t\t\t\"fall_alert\":        true,\n347\t\t\t\"FallDetected\":      true,\n348\t\t\t\"anomaly\":           true,\n349\t\t\t\"AnomalyDetected\":   true,\n350\t\t\t\"security_alert\":    true,\n351\t\t\t\"sleep_session_end\": true,\n352\t\t}\n353\t\t// Default to expert mode; switch to simple mode only when explicitly requested\n354\t\tisSimpleMode := mode == \"simple\"\n355\t\n356\t\t// Prepare FTS5 query with prefix matching\n357\t\tif q != \"\" {\n358\t\t\tq = prepareFTSQuery(q)\n359\t\t}\n360\t\n361\t\t// Determine query mode: FTS5 or regular\n362\t\tuseFTS := q != \"\"\n363\t\tp := \"\" // column prefix for FTS JOIN queries\n364\t\tif useFTS {\n365\t\t\tp = \"e.\"\n366\t\t}\n367\t\n368\t\t// Build SELECT columns and FROM clause\n369\t\tselectCols := p + \"id, \" + p + \"timestamp_ms, \" + p + \"type, \" + p + \"zone, \" +\n370\t\t\tp + \"person, \" + p + \"blob_id, \" + p + \"detail_json, \" + p + \"severity\"\n371\t\n372\t\tvar fromTable, baseWhere string\n373\t\tvar baseArgs []interface{}\n374\t\n375\t\tif useFTS {\n376\t\t\tfromTable = \"events e JOIN events_fts ft ON e.id = ft.rowid\"\n377\t\t\tbaseWhere = \"events_fts MATCH ?\"\n378\t\t\tbaseArgs = []interface{}{q}\n379\t\t} else {\n380\t\t\tfromTable = \"events\"\n381\t\t\tbaseWhere = \"1=1\"\n382\t\t\tbaseArgs = []interface{}{}\n383\t\t}\n384\t\n385\t\t// Build WHERE clause with filters\n386\t\twhereSQL := baseWhere\n387\t\twhereArgs := append([]interface{}{}, baseArgs...)\n388\t\n389\t\tif eventType != \"\" {\n390\t\t\twhereSQL += \" AND \" + p + \"type = ?\"\n391\t\t\twhereArgs = append(whereArgs, eventType)\n392\t\t} else if len(typesFilter) > 0 {\n393\t\t\t// Multiple type filter (from category checkboxes)\n394\t\t\tph := make([]string, len(typesFilter))\n395\t\t\tfor i := range ph {\n396\t\t\t\tph[i] = \"?\"\n397\t\t\t}\n398\t\t\twhereSQL += \" AND \" + p + \"type IN (\" + strings.Join(ph, \", \") + \")\"\n399\t\t\tfor _, t := range typesFilter {\n400\t\t\t\twhereArgs = append(whereArgs, t)\n401\t\t\t}\n402\t\t} else if isSimpleMode {\n403\t\t\t// In simple mode with no explicit type filter, only show person-relevant event types\n404\t\t\t// Build IN clause for simple mode types\n405\t\t\tsimpleTypeList := make([]string, 0, len(simpleModeTypes))\n406\t\t\tfor eventType := range simpleModeTypes {\n407\t\t\t\tsimpleTypeList = append(simpleTypeList, eventType)\n408\t\t\t}\n409\t\t\t// Build placeholder string for IN clause\n410\t\t\tplaceholders := make([]string, len(simpleTypeList))\n411\t\t\tfor i := range placeholders {\n412\t\t\t\tplaceholders[i] = \"?\"\n413\t\t\t}\n414\t\t\twhereSQL += \" AND \" + p + \"type IN (\" + strings.Join(placeholders, \", \") + \")\"\n415\t\t\tfor _, eventType := range simpleTypeList {\n416\t\t\t\twhereArgs = append(whereArgs, eventType)\n417\t\t\t}\n418\t\t}\n419\t\tif zone != \"\" {\n420\t\t\twhereSQL += \" AND \" + p + \"zone = ?\"\n421\t\t\twhereArgs = append(whereArgs, zone)\n422\t\t}\n423\t\tif person != \"\" {\n424\t\t\twhereSQL += \" AND \" + p + \"person = ?\"\n425\t\t\twhereArgs = append(whereArgs, person)\n426\t\t}\n427\t\tif afterTS > 0 {\n428\t\t\twhereSQL += \" AND \" + p + \"timestamp_ms >= ?\"\n429\t\t\twhereArgs = append(whereArgs, afterTS)\n430\t\t}\n431\t\tif untilTS > 0 {\n432\t\t\t// Use < untilTS+1000 to include the entire second when the until timestamp\n433\t\t\t// is in second precision (RFC3339 format truncates sub-seconds).\n434\t\t\twhereSQL += \" AND \" + p + \"timestamp_ms < ?\"\n435\t\t\twhereArgs = append(whereArgs, untilTS+1000)\n436\t\t}\n437\t\n438\t\t// COUNT for total_filtered\n439\t\tcountSQL := \"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM \" + fromTable + \" WHERE \" + whereSQL\n440\t\tvar totalFiltered int\n441\t\tif err := e.db.QueryRow(countSQL, whereArgs...).Scan(&totalFiltered); err != nil {\n442\t\t\twriteJSONError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, \"failed to count events\")\n443\t\t\treturn\n444\t\t}\n445\t\n446\t\t// Data query: add before cursor + ordering + limit\n447\t\tdataWhere := whereSQL\n448\t\tdataArgs := append([]interface{}{}, whereArgs...)\n449\t\tif beforeTS > 0 {\n450\t\t\tdataWhere += \" AND \" + p + \"timestamp_ms < ?\"\n451\t\t\tdataArgs = append(dataArgs, beforeTS)\n452\t\t}\n453\t\t// untilTS is already included in the base WHERE clause via whereArgs\n454\t\n455\t\tdataSQL := \"SELECT \" + selectCols + \" FROM \" + fromTable +\n456\t\t\t\" WHERE \" + dataWhere +\n457\t\t\t\" ORDER BY \" + p + \"timestamp_ms DESC, \" + p + \"id DESC\" +\n458\t\t\t\" LIMIT ?\"\n459\t\tdataArgs = append(dataArgs, limit+1)\n460\t\n461\t\trows, err := e.db.Query(dataSQL, dataArgs...)\n462\t\tif err != nil {\n463\t\t\twriteJSONError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, \"failed to query events\")\n464\t\t\treturn\n465\t\t}\n466\t\tdefer rows.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n467\t\n468\t\tevents := make([]*Event, 0, limit)\n469\t\tfor rows.Next() {\n470\t\t\tvar ev Event\n471\t\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&ev.ID, &ev.Timestamp, &ev.Type, &ev.Zone,\n472\t\t\t\t&ev.Person, &ev.BlobID, &ev.DetailJSON, &ev.Severity); err != nil {\n473\t\t\t\tcontinue\n474\t\t\t}\n475\t\t\tevents = append(events, &ev)\n476\t\t}\n477\t\n478\t\thasMore := len(events) > limit\n479\t\tif hasMore {\n480\t\t\tevents = events[:limit]\n481\t\t}\n482\t\n483\t\tcursor := \"\"\n484\t\tif hasMore && len(events) > 0 {\n485\t\t\tcursor = strconv.FormatInt(events[len(events)-1].Timestamp, := timestamp.UnixNano() / 1e6\n\tif severity == \"\" {\n\t\tseverity = \"info\"\n\t}\n\n\tresult, err := h.db.Exec(`\n\t\tINSERT INTO events (timestamp_ms, type, zone, person, blob_id, detail_json, &EventsHandler{db: db}\n}\n\n// Close releases resources. If the handler owns the DB connection, it closes it.\nfunc (e *EventsHandler) Close() {\n\tif e.ownsDB {\n\t\te.db.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\t}\n}\n\n// Archive runs the archive job to move old events to the archive table.\nfunc (e *EventsHandler) Archive(_ interface{}) {\n\t_ = events.RunArchiveJob(e.db) //nolint:errcheck // errors logged internally\n}\n\n// createEventsSchema creates the events, events_archive, and FTS5 tables.\nfunc createEventsSchema(db *sql.DB) error {\n\tschema := `\n\tCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS events (\n\t\tid          INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n\t\ttimestamp_ms INTEGER NOT NULL,\n\t\ttype        TEXT    NOT NULL,\n\t\tzone        TEXT,\n\t\tperson      TEXT,\n\t\tblob_id     INTEGER,\n\t\tdetail_json TEXT,\n\t\tseverity DESC);\n\tCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_events_zone ON events(zone, timestamp_ms DESC);\n\tCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_events_person ON events(person, timestamp_ms DESC);\n\tCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS events_archive (\n\t\tid          INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n\t\ttimestamp_ms INTEGER NOT NULL,\n\t\ttype        TEXT    NOT NULL,\n\t\tzone        TEXT,\n\t\tperson      TEXT,\n\t\tblob_id     INTEGER,\n\t\tdetail_json TEXT,\n\t\tseverity    TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT 'info'\n\t);\n\tCREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS events_fts USING fts5(\n\t\ttype, zone, person, detail_json,\n\t\tcontent='events', content_rowid='id'\n\t);\n\tCREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS events_fts_insert AFTER INSERT ON events BEGIN\n\t\tINSERT INTO events_fts(rowid, type, zone, person, detail_json)\n\t\tVALUES (new.id, new.type, new.zone, new.person, new.detail_json);\n\tEND;\n\tCREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS events_fts_delete AFTER DELETE ON events BEGIN\n\t\tINSERT INTO events_fts(events_fts, rowid, type, zone, person, detail_json)\n\t\tVALUES ('delete', old.id, old.type, old.zone, old.person, old.detail_json);\n\tEND;\n\tCREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS events_fts_update AFTER UPDATE ON events BEGIN\n\t\tINSERT INTO events_fts(events_fts, rowid, type, zone, person, detail_json)\n\t\tVALUES ('delete', old.id, old.type, old.zone, old.person, old.detail_json);\n\tINSERT INTO events_fts(rowid, type, zone, person, detail_json)\n\tVALUES (new.id, new.type, new.zone, new.person, new.detail_json);\n\tEND;\n\t`\n\t_, err := db.Exec(schema)\n\treturn err\n}\n\n// isValidEventType checks whether the event type string is a known type.\nfunc isValidEventType(t string) bool {\n\tswitch t {\n\tcase \"detection\", \"zone_entry\", \"zone_exit\", \"portal_crossing\",\n\t\t\"trigger_fired\", \"fall_alert\", \"FallDetected\", \"anomaly\", \"AnomalyDetected\", \"security_alert\",\n\t\t\"node_online\", \"node_offline\", \"ota_update\", \"baseline_changed\",\n\t\t\"system\", \"learning_milestone\", \"sleep_session_end\", \"ZoneTransition\",\n\t\t\"presence_transition\", \"stationary_detected\", \"anomaly_learned\", \"sleep_session_start\":\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\n// RegisterRoutes registers events endpoints.\n//\n// GET /api/events — paginated event list with FTS5 search and keyset cursor pagination.\n//\n//\tQuery params: limit (default 50, max 500), before (timestamp_ms cursor),\n//\tsince (ISO8601), until (ISO8601), type (single type filter),\n//\ttypes (comma-separated type list for category filtering),\n//\tzone, zone_id, person, person_id, q (FTS5 query), mode (expert|simple).\n//\n// GET /api/events/{id} — single event by ID.\n//\n// POST /api/events/{id}/feedback — submit feedback for an event.\nfunc (e *EventsHandler) RegisterRoutes(r chi.Router) {\n\tr.Get(\"/api/events\", e.listEvents)\n\tr.Get(\"/api/events/{id}\", e.getEvent)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/events/{id}/feedback\", e.postEventFeedback)\n}\n\n// eventsResponse is the JSON response for GET /api/events.\ntype eventsResponse struct {\n\tEvents        []*Event `json:\"events\"`\n\tCursor        string   `json:\"cursor,omitempty\"`\n\tHasMore       bool     `json:\"has_more\"`\n\tTotalFiltered int      `json:\"total_filtered\"`\n}\n\n// prepareFTSQuery appends a trailing * for prefix matching if the query\n// doesn't already end with a FTS5 operator character. This enables\n// partial word matching (e.g., \"kit\" matches \"kitchen\").\nfunc prepareFTSQuery(q string) string {\n\tq = strings.TrimSpace(q)\n\tif q == \"\" {\n\t\treturn q\n\t}\n\t// If the query already ends with a FTS5 special character or operator, leave it alone.\n\tlast := q[len(q)-1]\n\tif last == '*' || last == '\"' || last == ')' {\n\t\treturn q\n\t}\n\t// For simple terms (no operators), append * for prefix matching.\n\t// If the query contains FTS5 operators (AND, OR, NOT, NEAR), append * to each\n\t// simple token instead.\n\tif strings.Contains(q, \" AND \") || strings.Contains(q, \" OR \") ||\n\t\tstrings.Contains(q, \" NOT \") || strings.Contains(q, \" NEAR \") {\n\t\t// Has operators — append * to each token that isn't an operator or quoted phrase.\n\t\tparts := strings.Fields(q)\n\t\tfor i, p := range parts {\n\t\t\tif p == \"AND\" || p == \"OR\" || p == \"NOT\" || p == \"NEAR\" {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (strings.HasPrefix(p, `\"`) && strings.HasSuffix(p, `\"`)) || p == \"(\" || p == \")\" {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tparts[i] = p + \"*\"\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn strings.Join(parts, \" \")\n\t}\n\t// Simple single-term query — just append * for prefix matching.\n\treturn q + \"*\"\n}\n\nfunc (e *EventsHandler) listEvents(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t// Parse limit\n\tlimit := eventsDefaultLimit\n\tif s := r.URL.Query().Get(\"limit\"); s != \"\" {\n\t\tif n, err := strconv.Atoi(s); err == nil && n > 0 {\n\t\t\tlimit = n\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif limit > eventsMaxLimit {\n\t\tlimit = eventsMaxLimit\n\t}\n\n\t// Parse before cursor (timestamp_ms as string)\n\tvar beforeTS int64\n\tif s := r.URL.Query().Get(\"before\"); s != \"\" {\n\t\tbeforeTS, _ = strconv.ParseInt(s, 10, 64)\n\t}\n\n\t// Parse filters\n\tq := r.URL.Query().Get(\"q\")\n\teventType := r.URL.Query().Get(\"type\")\n\ttypesStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"types\") // comma-separated list of event types\n\tzone := r.URL.Query().Get(\"zone\")\n\tzoneID := r.URL.Query().Get(\"zone_id\")\n\tif zoneID != \"\" {\n\t\tzone = zoneID // zone_id takes precedence over zone\n\t}\n\tperson := r.URL.Query().Get(\"person\")\n\tpersonID := r.URL.Query().Get(\"person_id\")\n\tif personID != \"\" {\n\t\tperson = personID // person_id takes precedence over person\n\t}\n\tafterStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"after\")\n\tsinceStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"since\") // Alias for after\n\tuntilStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"until\") // Upper bound timestamp\n\tmode := r.URL.Query().Get(\"mode\")      // \"expert\" or \"simple\" (default: simple)\n\n\t// Parse and validate types list (comma-separated)\n\tvar typesFilter []string\n\tif typesStr != \"\" {\n\t\tfor _, t := range strings.Split(typesStr, \",\") {\n\t\t\tt = strings.TrimSpace(t)\n\t\t\tif t == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif !isValidEventType(t) {\n\t\t\t\twriteJSONError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid event type: \"+t)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\ttypesFilter = append(typesFilter, t)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Validate event type\n\tif eventType != \"\" && !isValidEventType(eventType) {\n\t\twriteJSONError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid event type\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Validate after/since timestamp (prefer since if both provided)\n\tvar afterTS int64\n\ttimeStr := afterStr\n\tif sinceStr != \"\" {\n\t\ttimeStr = sinceStr\n\t}\n\tif timeStr != \"\" {\n\t\tt, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, timeStr)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\twriteJSONError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid since/after timestamp\")\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\tafterTS = t.UnixNano() / 1e6\n\t}\n\n\t// Validate until timestamp (upper bound)\n\tvar untilTS int64\n\tif untilStr != \"\" {\n\t\tt, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, untilStr)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\twriteJSONError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, \"invalid until timestamp\")\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\tuntilTS = t.UnixNano() / 1e6\n\t}\n\n\t// Person-relevant event types for simple mode\n\t// Simple mode shows only person-relevant events: zone_entry, zone_exit, ZoneTransition, portal_crossing, fall_alert, FallDetected, anomaly, AnomalyDetected, security_alert, sleep_session_end\n\t// Simple mode hides: node_online, node_offline, ota_update, baseline_changed, system, learning_milestone, detection, presence_transition, stationary_detected\n\tsimpleModeTypes := map[string]bool{\n\t\t\"zone_entry\":        true,\n\t\t\"zone_exit\":         true,\n\t\t\"ZoneTransition\":    true,\n\t\t\"portal_crossing\":   true,\n\t\t\"fall_alert\":        true,\n\t\t\"FallDetected\":      true,\n\t\t\"anomaly\":           true,\n\t\t\"AnomalyDetected\":   true,\n\t\t\"security_alert\":    true,\n\t\t\"sleep_session_end\": true,\n\t}\n\t// Default to expert mode; switch to simple mode only when explicitly requested\n\tisSimpleMode := mode == \"simple\"\n\n\t// Prepare FTS5 query with prefix matching\n\tif q != \"\" {\n\t\tq = prepareFTSQuery(q)\n\t}\n\n\t// Determine query mode: FTS5 or regular\n\tuseFTS := q != \"\"\n\tp := \"\" // column prefix for FTS JOIN queries\n\tif useFTS {\n\t\tp = \"e.\"\n\t}\n\n\t// Build SELECT columns and FROM clause\n\tselectCols := p + \"id, \" + p + \"timestamp_ms, \" + p + \"type, \" + p + \"zone, \" +\n\t\tp + \"person, \" + p + \"blob_id, \" + p + \"detail_json, \" + p + \"severity\"\n\n\tvar fromTable, baseWhere string\n\tvar baseArgs []interface{}\n\n\tif useFTS {\n\t\tfromTable = \"events e JOIN events_fts ft ON e.id = ft.rowid\"\n\t\tbaseWhere = \"events_fts MATCH ?\"\n\t\tbaseArgs = []interface{}{q}\n\t} else {\n\t\tfromTable = \"events\"\n\t\tbaseWhere = \"1=1\"\n\t\tbaseArgs = []interface{}{}\n\t}\n\n\t// Build WHERE clause with filters\n\twhereSQL := baseWhere\n\twhereArgs := append([]interface{}{}, baseArgs...)\n\n\tif eventType != \"\" {\n\t\twhereSQL += \" AND \" + p + \"type = ?\"\n\t\twhereArgs = append(whereArgs, eventType)\n\t} else if len(typesFilter) > 0 {\n\t\t// Multiple type filter (from category checkboxes)\n\t\tph := make([]string, len(typesFilter))\n\t\tfor i := range ph {\n\t\t\tph[i] = \"?\"\n\t\t}\n\t\twhereSQL += \" AND \" + p + \"type IN (\" + strings.Join(ph, \", \") + \")\"\n\t\tfor _, t := range typesFilter {\n\t\t\twhereArgs = append(whereArgs, t)\n\t\t}\n\t} else if isSimpleMode {\n\t\t// In simple mode with no explicit type filter, only show person-relevant event types\n\t\t// Build IN clause for simple mode types\n\t\tsimpleTypeList := make([]string, 0, len(simpleModeTypes))\n\t\tfor eventType := range simpleModeTypes {\n\t\t\tsimpleTypeList = append(simpleTypeList, eventType)\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Build placeholder string for IN clause\n\t\tplaceholders := make([]string, len(simpleTypeList))\n\t\tfor i := range placeholders {\n\t\t\tplaceholders[i] = \"?\"\n\t\t}\n\t\twhereSQL += \" AND \" + p + \"type IN (\" + strings.Join(placeholders, \", \") + \")\"\n\t\tfor _, eventType := range simpleTypeList {\n\t\t\twhereArgs = append(whereArgs, eventType)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif zone != \"\" {\n\t\twhereSQL += \" AND \" + p + \"zone = ?\"\n\t\twhereArgs = append(whereArgs, zone)\n\t}\n\tif person != \"\" {\n\t\twhereSQL += \" AND \" + p + \"person = ?\"\n\t\twhereArgs = append(whereArgs, person)\n\t}\n\tif afterTS > 0 {\n\t\twhereSQL += \" AND \" + p + \"timestamp_ms >= ?\"\n\t\twhereArgs = append(whereArgs, afterTS)\n\t}\n\tif untilTS > 0 {\n\t\t// Use < untilTS+1000 to include the entire second when the until timestamp\n\t\t// is in second precision (RFC3339 format truncates sub-seconds).\n\t\twhereSQL += \" AND \" + p + \"timestamp_ms < ?\"\n\t\twhereArgs = append(whereArgs, untilTS+1000)\n\t}\n\n\t// COUNT for total_filtered\n\tcountSQL := \"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM \" + fromTable + \" WHERE \" + whereSQL\n\tvar totalFiltered int\n\tif err := e.db.QueryRow(countSQL, whereArgs...).Scan(&totalFiltered); err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSONError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, \"failed to count events\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Data query: add before cursor + ordering + limit\n\tdataWhere := whereSQL\n\tdataArgs := append([]interface{}{}, whereArgs...)\n\tif beforeTS > 0 {\n\t\tdataWhere += \" AND \" + p + \"timestamp_ms < ?\"\n\t\tdataArgs = append(dataArgs, beforeTS)\n\t}\n\t// untilTS is already included in the base WHERE clause via whereArgs\n\n\tdataSQL := \"SELECT \" + selectCols + \" FROM \" + fromTable +\n\t\t\" WHERE \" + dataWhere +\n\t\t\" ORDER BY \" + p + \"timestamp_ms DESC, \" + p + \"id DESC\" +\n\t\t\" LIMIT ?\"\n\tdataArgs = append(dataArgs, limit+1)\n\n\trows, err := e.db.Query(dataSQL, dataArgs...)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSONError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, \"failed to query events\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tdefer rows.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\n\tevents := make([]*Event, 0, limit)\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar ev Event\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&ev.ID, &ev.Timestamp, &ev.Type, &ev.Zone,\n\t\t\t&ev.Person, &ev.BlobID, &ev.DetailJSON, &ev.Severity); err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tevents = append(events, &ev)\n\t}\n\n\thasMore := len(events) > limit\n\tif hasMore {\n\t\tevents = events[:limit]\n\t}\n\n\tcursor := \"\"\n\tif hasMore && len(events) > 0 {\n\t\tcursor = strconv.FormatInt(events[len(events)-1].Timestamp, 10)\n\t}\n\n\twriteJSON(w, http.StatusOK, eventsResponse{\n\t\tEvents:        events,\n\t\tCursor:        cursor,\n\t\tHasMore:       hasMore,\n\t\tTotalFiltered: totalFiltered,\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc (e *EventsHandler) getEvent(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tidStr := chi.URLParam(r, \"id\")\n\tid, err := strconv.ParseInt(idStr, 10, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\twriteJSONError(w, };\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Subscriber Registry\n    // ============================================\n    const subscribers = new Map();\n\n    /**\n     * return function() {};\n        }\n\n        if (!subscribers.has(key)) {\n            subscribers.set(key, []);\n        }\n\n        const callbacks = subscribers.get(key);\n /**\n     * Notify subscribers of a state change\n     * @param {string} key - State key that changed\n     * @param {*} newValue - New value\n     * @param {*} oldValue - Previous value\n     */\n    function notify(key, newValue, oldValue) {\n        // Notify key-specific subscribers\n        if (subscribers.has(key)) {\n            const callbacks = subscribers.get(key);\n            callbacks.forEach(callback => {\n                try {\n                    callback(newValue, oldValue, key);\n                } catch (e) {\n                    console.error('[State] Subscriber Virtualization Setup\n266\t\t// ============================================\n267\t\tfunction setupVirtualization() {\n268\t\t\tif (!CONFIG.virtualization.enabled || !elements.eventsList) {\n269\t\t\t\treturn;\n270\t\t\t}\n271\t\n272\t\t\t// Create IntersectionObserver for lazy rendering\n273\t\t\tconst observerOptions = {\n274\t\t\t\troot: elements.eventsList,\n275\t\t\t\trootMargin: {\n280\t\t\t\thandleIntersection(entries);\n281\t\t\t}, observerOptions);\n282\t\n283\t\t\t// Set up scroll listener for virtualization\n284\t\t\tif (elements.eventsList) {\n285\t\t\t\telements.eventsList.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });\n286\t\t\t}\n287\t\n288\t\t\tconsole.log('[Timeline] Virtualization enabled with IntersectionObserver');\n289\t\t}\n290\t\n291\t\t// ============================================\n292\t\t// Intersection Observer Handler\n293\t\t// ============================================\n294\t\tfunction handleIntersection(entries) {\n295\t\t\tentries.forEach(function(entry) {\n296\t\t\t\tconst index = parseInt(entry.target.dataset.index, 10);\n297\t\t\t\tif (isNaN(index)) return;\n298\t\n299\t\t\t\tif (entry.isIntersecting) {\n300\t\t\t\t\tstate.virtualization.visibleIndices.add(index);\n301\t\t\t\t} else {\n302\t\t\t\t\tstate.virtualization.visibleIndices.delete(index);\n303\t\t\t\t}\n304\t\t\t});\n305\t\n306\t\t\t// Update rendered range based on visibility\n307\t\t\tupdateRenderedRange();\n308\t\t}\n309\t\n310\t\t// ============================================\n311\t\t// Scroll Handler for Virtualization\n312\t\t// ============================================\n313\t\tfunction onScroll() {\n314\t\t\tif (!elements.eventsList) return;\n315\t\n316\t\t\tstate.virtualization.scrollTop = elements.eventsList.scrollTop;\n317\t\n318\t\t\t// Update visible range based on scroll position\n319\t\t\tconst firstIndex = Math.floor(state.virtualization.scrollTop / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n320\t\t\tconst visibleCount = Math.ceil(elements.eventsList.clientHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n321\t\t\tconst lastIndex = firstIndex + visibleCount;\n322\t\n323\t\t\tstate.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = Math.max(0, firstIndex - CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n324\t\t\tstate.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.filteredEvents.length - 1, lastIndex + CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n325\t\n326\t\t\tupdateRenderedRange();\n327\t\t}\n328\t\n329\t\t// ============================================\n330\t\t// Update Rendered Range\n331\t\t// ============================================\n332\t\tfunction updateRenderedRange() {\n333\t\t\tif state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex);\n337\t\n338\t\t\t// Unobserve items that are no longer in range\n339\t\t\tstate.virtualization.renderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n340\t\t\t\tif (index < firstIdx || index > lastIdx) {\n341\t\t\t\t\tconst item = elements.eventsList.querySelector('[data-index=\"' + index + '\"]');\n342\t\t\t\t\tif (item && state.virtualization.observer) {\n343\t\t\t\t\t\tstate.virtualization.observer.unobserve(item);\n344\t\t\t\t\t}\n345\t\t\t\t}\n346\t\t\t});\n347\t\n348\t\t\t// Create new set of rendered indices\n349\t\t\tconst newRenderedIndices = index;\n365\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfragment.appendChild(newEventEl);\n366\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n367\t\t\t\t\t}\n368\t\t\t\t} else {\n369\t\t\t\t\t// Keep existing item in rendered set\n370\t\t\t\t\tnewRenderedIndices.add(index);\n371\t\t\t\t}\n372\t\t\t});\n373\t\n374\t\t\tif (fragment.children.length > 0) {\n375\t\t\t\telements.eventsList.appendChild(fragment);\n376\t\n377\t\t\t\t// Bind handlers for new items\n378\t\t\t\tArray.from(fragment.children).forEach(function(item) {\n379\t\t\t\t\tbindEventHandlersForElement(item);\n380\t\t\t\t\tif (state.virtualization.observer) {\n381\t\t\t\t\t\tstate.virtualization.observer.observe(item);\n382\t\t\t\t\t}\n383\t\t\t\t});\n384\t\t\t}\n385\t\n386\t\t\t// Remove items that are no longer in rendered range\n387\t\t\tstate.virtualization.renderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n388\t\t\t\tif (!newRenderedIndices.has(index)) {\n389\t\t\t\t\tconst item = {\n391\t\t\t\t\t\titem.remove();\n392\t\t\t\t\t}\n393\t\t\t\t}\n394\t\t\t});\n395\t\n396\t\t\tstate.virtualization.renderedIndices = newRenderedIndices;\n397\t\n398\t\t\t// Update total height for spacer\n399\t\t\tupdateVirtualSpacers();\n400\t\t}\n401\t\n402\t\t// ============================================\n403\t\t// Update Virtual Spacers\n404\t\t// ============================================\n405\t\tfunction updateVirtualSpacers() {\n406\t\t\tif (!elements.eventsList) return;\n407\t\n408\t\t\tconst totalHeight = state.filteredEvents.length * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n409\t\t\tstate.virtualization.totalHeight = totalHeight;\n410\t\n411\t\t\t// Add top spacer if needed\n412\t\t\tlet topSpacer = 1) * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n428\t\t\tbottomSpacer.style.height = Math.max(0, remainingHeight) + 'px';\n429\t\t}\n430\t\n431\t\tfunction cacheElements() {\n432\t\t\telements = {\n433\t\t\t\tcontainer: {\n540\t\t\t\tstate.dashboardMode = 'live';\n541\t\t\t}\n542\t\n543\t\t\tif (newMode === 'timeline') {\n544\t\t\t\t// Container is shown by inline script, just load events if needed\n545\t\t\t\tif (state.allLoadedEvents.length === 0) {\n546\t\t\t\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n547\t\t\t\t} else {\n548\t\t\t\t\t// Reload events with new mode\n549\t\t\t\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n550\t\t\t\t}\n551\t\t\t}\n552\t\t}\n553\t\n554\t\t// ============================================\n555\t\t// Event Loading\n556\t\t// ============================================\n557\t\tfunction loadInitialEvents() {\n558\t\t\tconst params = new URLSearchParams();\n559\t\t\tparams.set('limit', true);\n565\t\t}\n566\t\n567\t\tfunction loadMoreEvents() {\n568\t\t\tif (state.loading || !state.cursor) {\n569\t\t\t\treturn;\n570\t\t\t}\n571\t\n572\t\t\tconst params = new URLSearchParams();\n573\t\t\tparams.set('limit', CONFIG.initialLoadLimit);\n574\t\t\tif (state.cursor) {\n575\t\t\t\tparams.set('before', state.cursor);\n576\t\t\t}\n577\t\n578\t\t\tapplyFiltersToParams(params);\n579\t\n580\t\t\tconst url = '/api/events?' + params.toString();\n581\t\t\tfetchEvents(url, false);\n582\t\t}\n583\t\n584\t\tfunction fetchEvents(url, isInitial) {\n585\t\t\tstate.loading = true;\n586\t\t\tupdateLoadingState();\n587\t\n588\t\t\tfetch(url)\n589\t\t\t\t.then(function(res) {\n590\t\t\t\t\tif (!res.ok) {\n591\t\t\t\t\t\tthrow new Error('Failed to fetch events: ' + res.statusText);\n592\t\t\t\t\t}\n593\t\t\t\t\treturn res.json();\n594\t\t\t\t})\n595\t\t\t\t.then(function(data) {\n596\t\t\t\t\tif (isInitial) {\n597\t\t\t\t\t\tstate.allLoadedEvents = [];\n598\t\t\t\t\t\tstate.filteredEvents = [];\n599\t\t\t\t\t}\n600\t\n601\t\t\t\t\t// Append to all loaded events\n602\t\t\t\t\tstate.allLoadedEvents = state.allLoadedEvents.concat(data.events || []);\n603\t\t\t\t\tstate.cursor = data.cursor || null;\n604\t\t\t\t\tstate.total = data.total_filtered || 0;\n605\t\n606\t\t\t\t\t// Update filter options with new data\n607\t\t\t\t\tupdateFilterOptions(data.events);\n608\t\n609\t\t\t\t\t// Apply client-side filters\n610\t\t\t\t\tapplyClientSideFilters();\n611\t\n612\t\t\t\t\tupdateLoadMoreButton();\n613\t\t\t\t})\n614\t\t\t\t.catch(function(err) {\n615\t\t\t\t\tconsole.error('[Timeline] Failed to load events:', err);\n616\t\t\t\t\tstate.error = err.message;\n617\t\t\t\t\tshowError(err.message);\n618\t\t\t\t})\n619\t\t\t\t.finally(function() {\n620\t\t\t\t\tstate.loading = false;\n621\t\t\t\t\tupdateLoadingState();\n622\t\t\t\t});\n623\t\t}\n624\t\n625\t\t// ============================================\n626\t\t// Filter Handling\n627\t\t// ============================================\n628\t\tfunction onFilterChange() {\n629\t\t\t// Update filter state\n630\t\t\tif (elements.filterType) {\n631\t\t\t\tconst value = checkboxes when specific type selected\n636\t\t\t\t\tdisableCategoryCheckboxes(true);\n637\t\t\t\t} else {\n638\t\t\t\t\tstate.filters.type = null;\n644\t\t\t}\n645\t\t\tif (elements.filterPerson) {\n646\t\t\t\tstate.filters.person = elements.filterPerson.value || null;\n647\t\t\t}\n648\t\n649\t\t\t// Reload events with new server-side filters\n650\t\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n651\t\t}\n652\t\n653\t\tfunction onTimeFilterChange() {\n654\t\t\tif (!elements.filterTime) return;\n655\t\n656\t\t\tconst value = elements.filterTime.value;\n657\t\n658\t\t\t// Hide/show custom date container\n659\t\t\tif (elements.customDateContainer) {\n660\t\t\t\tif (value === 'custom') {\n661\t\t\t\t\telements.customDateContainer.style.display = 'flex';\n662\t\t\t\t} else {\n663\t\t\t\t\telements.customDateContainer.style.display = 'none';\n664\t\t\t\t}\n665\t\t\t}\n666\t\n667\t\t\tif (value === 'today') {\n668\t\t\t\tconst today = new Date();\n669\t\t\t\ttoday.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);\n670\t\t\t\tstate.filters.after = today.toISOString();\n671\t\t\t\tstate.filters.until = null;\n672\t\t\t} else if (value === '7d') {\n673\t\t\t\tconst weekAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);\n674\t\t\t\tstate.filters.after = weekAgo.toISOString();\n675\t\t\t\tstate.filters.until = null;\n676\t\t\t} else if (value === '30d') {\n677\t\t\t\tconst monthAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);\n678\t\t\t\tstate.filters.after = monthAgo.toISOString();\n679\t\t\t\tstate.filters.until = null;\n680\t\t\t} else if (value === 'custom') {\n681\t\t\t\t// Wait for user to apply custom range\n682\t\t\t\treturn;\n683\t\t\t} else {\n684\t\t\t\tstate.filters.after = null;\n685\t\t\t\tstate.filters.until = null;\n686\t\t\t}\n687\t\n688\t\t\t// Reload events with new date range\n689\t\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n690\t\t}\n691\t\n692\t\tfunction applyCustomDateRange() {\n693\t\t\tif (!elements.dateFrom || !elements.dateTo) return;\n694\t\n695\t\t\tconst fromDate = new Date(elements.dateFrom.value);\n696\t\t\tconst toDate = new Date(elements.dateTo.value);\n697\t\n698\t\t\tif (isNaN(fromDate.getTime()) || isNaN(toDate.getTime())) {\n699\t\t\t\tif (window.SpaxelApp && SpaxelApp.showToast) {\n700\t\t\t\t\tSpaxelApp.showToast('Invalid date range', 'warning');\n701\t\t\t\t}\n702\t\t\t\treturn;\n703\t\t\t}\n704\t\n705\t\t\t// Set to start of from day and end of to day\n706\t\t\tfromDate.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);\n707\t\t\ttoDate.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);\n708\t\n709\t\t\tstate.filters.after = fromDate.toISOString();\n710\t\t\tstate.filters.until = toDate.toISOString();\n711\t\n712\t\t\t// Reload events with custom date range\n713\t\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n714\t\t}\n715\t\n716\t\tfunction onSearchChange() {\n717\t\t\tif (elements.filterSearch) {\n718\t\t\t\tstate.filters.q = elements.filterSearch.value.trim() || null;\n719\t\t\t\tapplyClientSideFilters();\n720\t\t\t}\n721\t\t}\n722\t\n723\t\t// Fuzzy match: checks if all characters in query appear in text in order.\n724\t\t// \"ktchn\" matches \"kitchen\", \"alce\" matches \"alice\", etc.\n725\t\t// Returns a score (lower = better match) or -1 if no match.\n726\t\tfunction fuzzyMatch(query, text) {\n727\t\t\tif (!query || !text) return -1;\n728\t\t\tquery = query.toLowerCase();\n729\t\t\ttext = text.toLowerCase();\n730\t\n731\t\t\t// Fast path: exact substring match\n732\t\t\tvar idx = text.indexOf(query);\n733\t\t\tif (idx !== -1) return idx;\n734\t\n735\t\t\t// Character-sequence matching\n736\t\t\tvar qi = 0;\n737\t\t\tvar score = 0;\n738\t\t\tvar lastMatchIdx = -1;\n739\t\n740\t\t\tfor (var ti = 0; ti < text.length && qi < query.length; ti++) {\n741\t\t\t\tif (text[ti] === query[qi]) {\n742\t\t\t\t\tscore += (lastMatchIdx === ti - 1) ? 0 : 1;\n743\t\t\t\t\tlastMatchIdx = ti;\n744\t\t\t\t\tqi++;\n745\t\t\t\t}\n746\t\t\t}\n747\t\n748\t\t\treturn qi === query.length ? score : -1;\n749\t\t}\n750\t\n751\t\t// Multi-word fuzzy match: splits query into tokens, all must match.\n752\t\t// \"alice kit\" matches \"Alice entered Kitchen\" (both tokens match).\n753\t\tfunction fuzzyMatchAll(query, text) {\n754\t\t\tif (!query || !text) return false;\n755\t\t\tvar tokens = query.toLowerCase().split(/\\s+/).filter(function(t) { return t.length > 0; });\n756\t\t\tif (tokens.length === 0) return true;\n757\t\t\tvar textLower = text.toLowerCase();\n758\t\t\treturn tokens.every(function(token) {\n759\t\t\t\treturn fuzzyMatch(token, textLower) >= 0;\n760\t\t\t});\n761\t\t}\n762\t\n763\t\tfunction disableCategoryCheckboxes(disabled) {\n764\t\t\tconst checkboxes = [\n765\t\t\t\telements.categoryPresence,\n766\t\t\t\telements.categoryZones,\n767\t\t\t\telements.categoryAlerts,\n768\t\t\t\telements.categorySystem,\n769\t\t\t\telements.categoryLearning\n770\t\t\t];\n771\t\t\tcheckboxes.forEach(function(cb) {\n772\t\t\t\tif (cb) {\n773\t\t\t\t\tcb.disabled = disabled;\n774\t\t\t\t\tif (disabled) {\n775\t\t\t\t\t\tcb.parentElement.style.opacity = '0.5';\n776\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n777\t\t\t\t\t\tcb.parentElement.style.opacity = '1';\n778\t\t\t\t\t}\n779\t\t\t\t}\n780\t\t\t});\n781\t\t}\n782\t\n783\t\t// ============================================\n784\t\t// Client-Side Filtering\n785\t\t// ============================================\n786\t\tfunction applyClientSideFilters() {\n787\t\t\t// Start with all loaded events\n788\t\t\tlet filtered = state.allLoadedEvents.slice();\n789\t\n790\t\t\t// Apply category filters\n791\t\t\tif (!state.filters.type) {\n792\t\t\t\tconst enabledCategories = Object.keys(state.filters.categories).filter(\n793\t\t\t\t\tfunction(cat) { return state.filters.categories[cat]; }\n794\t\t\t\t);\n795\t\n796\t\t\t\tconst allowedTypes = new Set();\n797\t\t\t\tenabledCategories.forEach(function(cat) {\n798\t\t\t\t\tconst types = EVENT_CATEGORIES[cat];\n799\t\t\t\t\tif (types) {\n800\t\t\t\t\t\ttypes.forEach(function(t) { allowedTypes.add(t); });\n801\t\t\t\t\t}\n802\t\t\t\t});\n803\t\n804\t\t\t\tif (allowedTypes.size > 0) {\n805\t\t\t\t\tfiltered = filtered.filter(function(event) {\n806\t\t\t\t\t\treturn allowedTypes.has(event.type);\n807\t\t\t\t\t});\n808\t\t\t\t}\n809\t\t\t} else {\n810\t\t\t\t// Specific type filter\n811\t\t\t\tfiltered = filtered.filter(function(event) {\n812\t\t\t\t\treturn event.type === state.filters.type;\n813\t\t\t\t});\n814\t\t\t}\n815\t\n816\t\t\t// Apply zone filter\n817\t\t\tif (state.filters.zone) {\n818\t\t\t\tfiltered = filtered.filter(function(event) {\n819\t\t\t\t\treturn event.zone === state.filters.zone;\n820\t\t\t\t});\n821\t\t\t}\n822\t\n823\t\t\t// Apply person filter\n824\t\t\tif (state.filters.person) {\n825\t\t\t\tfiltered = filtered.filter(function(event) {\n826\t\t\t\t\treturn event.person === state.filters.person;\n827\t\t\t\t});\n828\t\t\t}\n829\t\n830\t\t\t// Apply text search with fuzzy matching\n831\t\t\tif (state.filters.q) {\n832\t\t\t\tconst query = state.filters.q;\n833\t\t\t\tfiltered = filtered.filter(function(event) {\n834\t\t\t\t\tvar searchParts = [event.type || '', event.zone || '', event.person || ''];\n835\t\t\t\t\tif (event.detail_json) {\n836\t\t\t\t\t\ttry {\n837\t\t\t\t\t\t\tvar detail = JSON.parse(event.detail_json);\n838\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (detail.description) searchParts.push(detail.description);\n839\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (detail.message) searchParts.push(detail.message);\n840\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsearchParts.push(JSON.stringify(detail));\n841\t\t\t\t\t\t} catch (e) {\n842\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsearchParts.push(event.detail_json);\n843\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n844\t\t\t\t\t}\n845\t\t\t\t\tvar combinedText = searchParts.join(' ');\n846\t\t\t\t\treturn fuzzyMatchAll(query, combinedText);\n847\t\t\t\t});\n848\t\t\t}\n849\t\n850\t\t\t// Sort by timestamp descending\n851\t\t\tfiltered.sort(function(a, b) {\n852\t\t\t\treturn b.timestamp_ms - a.timestamp_ms;\n853\t\t\t});\n854\t\n855\t\t\tstate.filteredEvents = filtered;\n856\t\t\trenderEvents();\n857\t\t}\n858\t\n859\t\tfunction applyFiltersToParams(params) {\n860\t\t\t// Server-side filters\n861\t\t\tif (state.filters.type) {\n862\t\t\t\tparams.set('type', state.filters.type);\n863\t\t\t} else {\n864\t\t\t\t// Send category-based types filter to server for efficient initial {\n868\t\t\t\t\tparams.set('types', enabledTypes.join(','));\n869\t\t\t\t}\n870\t\t\t}\n871\t\t\tif (state.filters.zone) {\n872\t\t\t\tparams.set('zone', state.filters.zone);\n873\t\t\t}\n874\t\t\tif {\n891\t\t\tvar types = [];\n892\t\t\tObject.keys(state.filters.categories).forEach(function(cat) {\n893\t\t\t\tif (state.filters.categories[cat]) {\n894\t\t\t\t\tvar catTypes = [];\n907\t\t\tObject.keys(EVENT_CATEGORIES).forEach(function(cat) {\n908\t\t\t\tEVENT_CATEGORIES[cat].forEach(function(t) {\n909\t\t\t\t\tif (types.indexOf(t) === -1) {\n920\t\t\t\thandleNewEvent(msg.event);\n921\t\t\t}\n922\t\t}\n923\t\n924\t\tfunction handleNewEvent(event) {\n925\t\t\tconsole.log('[Timeline] New event:', event);\n926\t\n927\t\t\t// Normalize escapeHtml(event.zone) : '';\n1104\t\t\tconst description = buildEventDescription(event);\n1105\t\n1106\t\t\t// Severity indicator for alerts\n1107\t\t\tconst severityClass = event.severity === 'alert' || event.severity === 'critical' ? ' severity-critical' : '';\n1108\t\t\tconst newClass = isNew ? ' new-event' : '';\n1109\t\n1110\t\t\t// Determine if this is a system event (for secondary styling)\n1111\t\t\t// System events: node_online, node_offline, ota_update, baseline_changed, system, learning_milestone, anomaly_learned\n1112\t\t\tconst systemEventTypes = ['node_online', 'node_offline', 'ota_update', 'baseline_changed', 'system', 'learning_milestone', 'anomaly_learned'];\n1113\t\t\tconst isSystemEvent = systemEventTypes.indexOf(event.type) !== -1;\n1114\t\t\tconst secondaryClass = isSystemEvent ? ' secondary' : '';\n1115\t\n1116\t\t\t// Check if this event has a blob_id for explainability\n1117\t\t\tconst hasBlobId = event.blob_id !== undefined && event.blob_id !== null && event.blob_id !== 0;\n1118\t\t\tconst explainabilityBtn = hasBlobId ? `\n1119\t\t\t\t<button class=\"timeline-explain-btn\" data-blob-id=\"${event.blob_id}\" title=\"Why is this here?\">\n1120\t\t\t\t\t<svg class=\"timeline-feedback-btn positive\" data-action=\"correct\" title=\"Correct\">👍</button>\n1145\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class=\"timeline-feedback-btn negative\" data-action=\"incorrect\" title=\"Incorrect\">👎</button>\n1146\t\t\t\t\t\t${explainabilityBtn}\n1147\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class=\"timeline-seek-btn\" title=\"Jump to this moment\">\n1148\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<svg
