{\n            elements.clearFiltersBtn.addEventListener('click', clearAllFilters);\n        }\n\n        // Load more\n        if (elements.loadMoreBtn) {\n            elements.loadMoreBtn.addEventListener('click', loadMoreEvents);\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Dropdown Population\n    // ============================================\n    function populateDropdowns() {\n        // People\n        fetch('/api/people')\n            .then(function(res) { return res.ok ? res.json() : null; })\n            .then(function(data) {\n                if (!data || !elements.personSelect) return;\n                var people = data.people || data || [];\n                people.forEach(function(p) {\n                    var name = p.name || p.label || p.id || '';\n                    if (!name) return;\n                    var opt = document.createElement('option');\n                    opt.value = name;\n                    opt.textContent = name;\n                    elements.personSelect.appendChild(opt);\n                });\n            })\n            .catch(function() {\n                // People endpoint may not be available yet — silently skip\n            });\n\n        // Zones\n        fetch('/api/zones')\n            .then(function(res) { return res.ok ? res.json() : null; })\n            .then(function(data) {\n                if (!data || !elements.zoneSelect) return;\n                var zones = Array.isArray(data) ? data : (data.zones || []);\n                zones.forEach(function(z) {\n                    var name = z.name || '';\n                    if (!name) return;\n                    var opt = document.createElement('option');\n                    opt.value = name;\n                    opt.textContent = name;\n                    elements.zoneSelect.appendChild(opt);\n                });\n            })\n            .catch(function() {\n                // Zones endpoint may not be available yet — silently skip\n            });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Mode Change Handlers\n    // ============================================\n    function onRouterModeChange() {\n        if (state.panelVisible) {\n            resetAndReload();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Panel Visibility\n    // ============================================\n    function showPanel() {\n        if (elements.panel) {\n            elements.panel.classList.remove('collapsed');\n            state.panelVisible = true;\n        }\n        if (elements.showBtn) {\n            elements.showBtn.classList.add('hidden');\n        }\n    }\n\n    function hidePanel() {\n        if (elements.panel) {\n            elements.panel.classList.add('collapsed');\n            state.panelVisible = false;\n        }\n        if (elements.showBtn) {\n            elements.showBtn.classList.remove('hidden');\n        }\n    }\n\n    function togglePanel() {\n        if (state.panelVisible) {\n            hidePanel();\n        } else {\n            showPanel();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Filter Controls Visibility\n    // ============================================\n    function toggleFilterControls() {\n        state.filterControlsVisible = !state.filterControlsVisible;\n        if (elements.filterControls) {\n            if (state.filterControlsVisible) {\n                elements.filterControls.classList.remove('collapsed');\n            } else {\n                elements.filterControls.classList.add('collapsed');\n            }\n        }\n        if (elements.filterToggleBtn) {\n            elements.filterToggleBtn.classList.toggle('active', state.filterControlsVisible);\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Date Range Handling (server-side)\n    // ============================================\n    function handleDateRangeChange(value) {\n        state.filters.dateRange = value;\n\n        if (elements.customDateContainer) {\n            elements.customDateContainer.style.display = value === 'custom' ? 'flex' : 'none';\n        }\n\n        if (value === 'custom') {\n            // Wait for the Apply button\n            return;\n        }\n\n        var now = new Date();\n        state.serverSince = '';\n        state.serverUntil = '';\n\n        switch (value) {\n            case 'today': {\n                var start = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), now.getDate());\n                state.serverSince = start.toISOString();\n                break;\n            }\n            case '7days':\n                state.serverSince = new Date(now.getTime() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();\n                break;\n            case '30days':\n                state.serverSince = new Date(now.getTime() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();\n                break;\n            default:\n                // 'all' — no bounds\n                break;\n        }\n\n        updateActiveFilters();\n        resetAndReload();\n    }\n\n    function applyCustomDateRange() {\n        var fromVal = elements.dateFrom ? elements.dateFrom.value : '';\n        var toVal = elements.dateTo ? elements.dateTo.value : '';\n\n        state.filters.customFrom = fromVal;\n        state.filters.customTo = toVal;\n\n        // Convert date strings (YYYY-MM-DD) to ISO8601\n        if (fromVal) {\n            state.serverSince = new Date(fromVal).toISOString();\n        } else {\n            state.serverSince = '';\n        }\n        if (toVal) {\n            // Include the full day by setting to end-of-day\n            var endOfDay = new Date(toVal);\n            endOfDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);\n            state.serverUntil = endOfDay.toISOString();\n        } else {\n            state.serverUntil = '';\n        }\n\n        updateActiveFilters();\n        resetAndReload();\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Event Loading\n    // ============================================\n\n    function buildServerParams(cursor) {\n        var params = new URLSearchParams();\n        params.set('limit', CONFIG.initialLoadLimit);\n\n        if (state.serverSince) params.set('since', state.serverSince);\n        if (state.serverUntil) params.set('until', state.serverUntil);\n\n        // Pass the search query to FTS5 when doing a fresh fetch\n        if (state.filters.searchQuery) {\n            params.set('q', state.filters.searchQuery);\n        }\n\n        // Collect enabled category types for server-side filtering\n        var enabledTypes = [];\n        Object.keys(state.filters.categories).forEach(function(cat) {\n            if (state.filters.categories[cat] && CATEGORY_TYPES[cat]) {\n                enabledTypes = enabledTypes.concat(CATEGORY_TYPES[cat]);\n            }\n        });\n        if (enabledTypes.length > 0) {\n            params.set('types', enabledTypes.join(','));\n        }\n\n        if (cursor) params.set('before', cursor);\n\n        return params;\n    }\n\n    function resetAndReload() {\n        state.allLoadedEvents = [];\n        state.events = [];\n        state.cursor = null;\n        state.hasMore = false;\n\n        if (elements.eventsContainer) elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n        renderLoadMore();\n        updateCountDisplay();\n        loadInitialEvents();\n    }\n\n    function loadInitialEvents() {\n        if (state.loading) return;\n        state.loading = true;\n        updateLoadingState();\n\n        var params = buildServerParams(null);\n\n        fetch('/api/events?' + params.toString())\n            .then(function(res) {\n                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch events: ' + res.statusText);\n                return res.json();\n            })\n            .then(function(data) {\n                state.allLoadedEvents = data.events || [];\n                state.cursor = data.cursor || null;\n                state.hasMore = data.has_more || false;\n                state.total = data.total_filtered || 0;\n                applyClientFilters();\n                renderLoadMore();\n                updateCountDisplay();\n            })\n            .catch(function(err) {\n                console.error('[SidebarTimeline] Failed to load events:', err);\n            })\n            .finally(function() {\n                state.loading = false;\n                updateLoadingState();\n            });\n    }\n\n    function loadMoreEvents() {\n        if (state.loading || !state.hasMore || !state.cursor) return;\n        state.loading = true;\n        updateLoadingState();\n\n        if (elements.loadMoreBtn) {\n            elements.loadMoreBtn.disabled = true;\n            elements.loadMoreBtn.textContent = 'Loading...';\n        }\n\n        var params = buildServerParams(state.cursor);\n\n        fetch('/api/events?' + params.toString())\n            .then(function(res) {\n                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch events: ' + res.statusText);\n                return res.json();\n            })\n            .then(function(data) {\n                var newEvents = data.events || [];\n                state.allLoadedEvents = state.allLoadedEvents.concat(newEvents);\n\n                // Trim to memory limit\n                if (state.allLoadedEvents.length > CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory) {\n                    state.allLoadedEvents = state.allLoadedEvents.slice(0, CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory);\n                }\n\n                state.cursor = data.cursor || null;\n                state.hasMore = data.has_more || false;\n                state.total = data.total_filtered || 0;\n\n                applyClientFilters();\n                renderLoadMore();\n                updateCountDisplay();\n            })\n            .catch(function(err) {\n                console.error('[SidebarTimeline] Failed to load more events:', err);\n            })\n            .finally(function() {\n                state.loading = false;\n                updateLoadingState();\n                if (elements.loadMoreBtn) {\n                    elements.loadMoreBtn.disabled = false;\n                    elements.loadMoreBtn.textContent = 'Load more';\n                }\n            });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Client-Side Filtering\n    // ============================================\n\n    function eventMatchesFilters(event) {\n        var typeInfo = EVENT_TYPES[event.type] || EVENT_TYPES.system;\n        var category = typeInfo.category || 'system';\n\n        // Category filter\n        if (!state.filters.categories[category]) return false;\n\n        // Person filter\n        if (state.filters.person && event.person !== state.filters.person) return false;\n\n        // Zone filter\n        if (state.filters.zone && event.zone !== state.filters.zone) return false;\n\n        // Text search — fuzzy match on computed description\n        if (state.filters.searchQuery) {\n            var desc = buildEventDescription(event, typeInfo).toLowerCase();\n            var query = state.filters.searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n            if (!fuzzyMatch(desc, query)) return false;\n        }\n\n        return true;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Simple fuzzy match: returns true if all characters in query appear\n     * in order within text, or text contains query as a substring.\n     * Uses substring match for short queries (< 4 chars) and sequential\n     * character matching for longer queries.\n     */\n    function fuzzyMatch(text, query) {\n        if (!query) return true;\n        if (text.indexOf(query) !== -1) return true;\n        if (query.length < 4) return false;\n\n        // Sequential character fuzzy match\n        var qi = 0;\n        for (var ti = 0; ti < text.length && qi < query.length; ti++) {\n            if (text[ti] === query[qi]) qi++;\n        }\n        return qi === query.length;\n    }\n\n    function applyClientFilters() {\n        state.events = state.allLoadedEvents.filter(eventMatchesFilters);\n        renderEvents();\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Active Filters Display\n    // ============================================\n    function updateActiveFilters() {\n        if (!elements.activeFilters || !elements.activeFilterTags) return;\n\n        var tags = [];\n\n        // Disabled categories\n        var allCats = ['presence', 'zones', 'alerts', 'system', 'learning'];\n        var catLabels = { presence: 'Presence', zones: 'Zones', alerts: 'Alerts', system: 'System', learning: 'Learning' };\n        allCats.forEach(function(cat) {\n            if (!state.filters.categories[cat]) {\n                tags.push({ label: catLabels[cat] + ' hidden', key: 'cat:' + cat });\n            }\n        });\n\n        // Person\n        if (state.filters.person) {\n            tags.push({ label: 'Person: ' + state.filters.person, key: 'person' });\n        }\n\n        // Zone\n        if (state.filters.zone) {\n            tags.push({ label: 'Zone: ' + state.filters.zone, key: 'zone' });\n        }\n\n        // Date range\n        var dateLabels = { today: 'Today', '7days': 'Last 7 days', '30days': 'Last 30 days', custom: 'Custom range' };\n        if (state.filters.dateRange !== 'all') {\n            var label = dateLabels[state.filters.dateRange] || state.filters.dateRange;\n            if (state.filters.dateRange === 'custom' && state.filters.customFrom) {\n                label = state.filters.customFrom + ' to ' + (state.filters.customTo || 'now');\n            }\n            tags.push({ label: label, key: 'date' });\n        }\n\n        // Search\n        if (state.filters.searchQuery) {\n            tags.push({ label: 'Search: ' + state.filters.searchQuery, key: 'search' });\n        }\n\n        if (tags.length === 0) {\n            elements.activeFilters.style.display = 'none';\n            return;\n        }\n\n        elements.activeFilters.style.display = 'flex';\n        elements.activeFilterTags.innerHTML = tags.map(function(tag) {\n            return '<span class=\"sidebar-filter-tag\" data-key=\"' + escapeHtml(tag.key) + '\">' +\n                escapeHtml(tag.label) +\n                '<button class=\"sidebar-filter-tag-remove\" title=\"Remove filter\">×</button>' +\n                '</span>';\n        }).join('');\n\n        // Bind remove buttons\n        elements.activeFilterTags.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-filter-tag-remove').forEach(function(btn) {\n            btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                var key = btn.closest('.sidebar-filter-tag').dataset.key;\n                removeFilter(key);\n            });\n        });\n    }\n\n    function removeFilter(key) {\n        if (key === 'person') {\n            state.filters.person = '';\n            if (elements.personSelect) elements.personSelect.value = '';\n            applyClientFilters();\n        } else if (key === 'zone') {\n            state.filters.zone = '';\n            if (elements.zoneSelect) elements.zoneSelect.value = '';\n            applyClientFilters();\n        } else if (key === 'search') {\n            state.filters.searchQuery = '';\n            if (elements.searchInput) elements.searchInput.value = '';\n            applyClientFilters();\n        } else if (key === 'date') {\n            state.filters.dateRange = 'all';\n            state.filters.customFrom = '';\n            state.filters.customTo = '';\n            state.serverSince = '';\n            state.serverUntil = '';\n            if (elements.dateRangeSelect) elements.dateRangeSelect.value = 'all';\n            if (elements.customDateContainer) elements.customDateContainer.style.display = 'none';\n            resetAndReload();\n        } else if (key.indexOf('cat:') === 0) {\n            var cat = key.substring(4);\n            state.filters.categories[cat] = true;\n            var catEl = document.getElementById('filter-category-' + cat);\n            if (catEl) catEl.checked = true;\n            applyClientFilters();\n        }\n        updateActiveFilters();\n    }\n\n    function clearAllFilters() {\n        state.filters.categories = { presence: true, zones: true, alerts: true, system: false, learning: false };\n        state.filters.person = '';\n        state.filters.zone = '';\n        state.filters.dateRange = 'all';\n        state.filters.customFrom = '';\n        state.filters.customTo = '';\n        state.filters.searchQuery = '';\n        state.serverSince = '';\n        state.serverUntil = '';\n\n        // Reset UI\n        if (elements.categoryPresence) elements.categoryPresence.checked = true;\n        if (elements.categoryZones) elements.categoryZones.checked = true;\n        if (elements.categoryAlerts) elements.categoryAlerts.checked = true;\n        if (elements.categorySystem) elements.categorySystem.checked = false;\n        if (elements.categoryLearning) elements.categoryLearning.checked = false;\n        if (elements.personSelect) elements.personSelect.value = '';\n        if (elements.zoneSelect) elements.zoneSelect.value = '';\n        if (elements.dateRangeSelect) elements.dateRangeSelect.value = 'all';\n        if (elements.searchInput) elements.searchInput.value = '';\n        if (elements.customDateContainer) elements.customDateContainer.style.display = 'none';\n\n        updateActiveFilters();\n        resetAndReload();\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Virtualization Setup\n    // ============================================\n    function setupVirtualization() {\n        if (!CONFIG.virtualization.enabled || !elements.content) return;\n\n        var observerOptions = {\n            root: elements.content,\n            rootMargin: CONFIG.virtualization.rootMargin,\n            threshold: CONFIG.virtualization.threshold\n        };\n\n        state.virtualization.observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {\n            handleIntersection(entries);\n        }, observerOptions);\n    }\n\n    function handleIntersection(entries) {\n        entries.forEach(function(entry) {\n            var index = parseInt(entry.target.dataset.index, 10);\n            if (isNaN(index)) return;\n            if (entry.isIntersecting) {\n                state.virtualization.visibleIndices.add(index);\n            } else {\n                state.virtualization.visibleIndices.delete(index);\n            }\n        });\n        updateRenderedRange();\n    }\n\n    function onScroll() {\n        if (!elements.content) return;\n\n        state.virtualization.scrollTop = elements.content.scrollTop;\n\n        var firstIndex = Math.floor(state.virtualization.scrollTop / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n        var visibleCount = Math.ceil(elements.content.clientHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n        var lastIndex = firstIndex + visibleCount;\n\n        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = Math.max(0, firstIndex - CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, lastIndex + CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n\n        updateRenderedRange();\n    }\n\n    function updateRenderedRange() {\n        if (!state.events.length) return;\n\n        var firstIdx = Math.max(0, state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex);\n        var lastIdx = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex);\n\n        var newRenderedIndices = new Set();\n        for (var i = firstIdx; i <= lastIdx; i++) {\n            newRenderedIndices.add(i);\n        }\n\n        var fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();\n        newRenderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n            if (!state.virtualization.renderedIndices.has(index)) {\n                var event = state.events[index];\n                if (event) {\n                    var tempDiv = document.createElement('div');\n                    tempDiv.innerHTML = renderEvent(event, false, index);\n                    var newEventEl = tempDiv.firstElementChild;\n                    if (newEventEl) {\n                        newEventEl.dataset.index = index;\n                        fragment.appendChild(newEventEl);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        });\n\n        if (fragment.children.length > 0) {\n            elements.eventsContainer.appendChild(fragment);\n            Array.from(fragment.children).forEach(function(item) {\n                bindEventHandlers(item);\n                if (state.virtualization.observer) {\n                    state.virtualization.observer.observe(item);\n                }\n            });\n        }\n\n        state.virtualization.renderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n            if (!newRenderedIndices.has(index)) {\n                var item = elements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-index=\"' + index + '\"]');\n                if (item) {\n                    if (state.virtualization.observer) {\n                        state.virtualization.observer.unobserve(item);\n                    }\n                    item.remove();\n                }\n            }\n        });\n\n        state.virtualization.renderedIndices = newRenderedIndices;\n        updateSpacers();\n    }\n\n    function updateSpacers() {\n        if (!elements.spacerTop || !elements.spacerBottom) return;\n        var topHeight = state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n        var bottomHeight = (state.events.length - state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex - 1) * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n        elements.spacerTop.style.height = Math.max(0, topHeight) + 'px';\n        elements.spacerBottom.style.height = Math.max(0, bottomHeight) + 'px';\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Rendering\n    // ============================================\n    function renderEvents() {\n        if (!elements.eventsContainer) return;\n\n        if (state.events.length === 0) {\n            elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n            if (elements.empty) elements.empty.style.display = 'flex';\n            if (elements.loading) elements.loading.style.display = 'none';\n            updateCountDisplay();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (elements.empty) elements.empty.style.display = 'none';\n        if (elements.loading) elements.loading.style.display = 'none';\n\n        // Reset virtualization state on re-render\n        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = 0;\n        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = 0;\n        state.virtualization.renderedIndices = new Set();\n\n        if (CONFIG.virtualization.enabled && state.events.length > CONFIG.maxDOMItems) {\n            renderVirtualized();\n        } else {\n            renderAll();\n        }\n\n        updateCountDisplay();\n    }\n\n    function renderAll() {\n        var html = '';\n        state.events.forEach(function(event, index) {\n            html += renderEvent(event, false, index);\n        });\n        elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = html;\n\n        Array.from(elements.eventsContainer.children).forEach(function(item) {\n            bindEventHandlers(item);\n        });\n    }\n\n    function renderVirtualized() {\n        elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n\n        var containerHeight = elements.content.clientHeight || 400;\n        var visibleCount = Math.ceil(containerHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n        var bufferCount = CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize;\n\n        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = 0;\n        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, visibleCount + bufferCount * 2);\n\n        updateSpacers();\n        updateRenderedRange();\n    }\n\n    function renderEvent(event, isNew, index) {\n        var typeInfo = EVENT_TYPES[event.type] || EVENT_TYPES.system;\n        var timeStr = formatTimestamp(event.timestamp_ms);\n        var description = buildEventDescription(event, typeInfo);\n\n        var severityClass = (event.severity === 'alert' || event.severity === 'critical') ? ' severity-critical' :\n                            (event.severity === 'warning' ? ' severity-warning' : '');\n        var newClass = isNew ? ' new-event' : '';\n\n        var systemEventTypes = ['node_online', 'node_offline', 'ota_update', 'baseline_changed', 'system', 'learning_milestone', 'anomaly_learned'];\n        var isSystemEvent = systemEventTypes.indexOf(event.type) !== -1;\n        var secondaryClass = isSystemEvent ? ' secondary' : '';\n\n        var dataIndex = index !== undefined ? (' data-index=\"' + index + '\"') : '';\n\n        return '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event' + severityClass + newClass + secondaryClass + '\"' +\n            ' data-type=\"' + escapeHtml(event.type) + '\"' +\n            ' data-id=\"' + event.id + '\"' +\n            ' data-timestamp=\"' + event.timestamp_ms + '\"' + dataIndex + '>' +\n            '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-icon\">' + typeInfo.icon + '</div>' +\n            '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-content\">' +\n            '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-title\">' + escapeHtml(description) + '</div>' +\n            '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-meta\">' +\n            '<span class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-time\">' + timeStr + '</span>' +\n            '</div>' +\n            '</div>' +\n            '<div class=\"sidebar-timeline-event-actions\">' +\n            '<button class=\"sidebar-timeline-action-btn feedback-positive\"' +\n            ' data-action=\"correct\" title=\"Correct detection\" aria-label=\"Thumbs up\">👍</button>' +\n            '<button class=\"sidebar-timeline-action-btn feedback-negative\"' +\n            ' data-action=\"incorrect\" title=\"Incorrect detection\" aria-label=\"Thumbs down\">👎</button>' +\n            '</div>' +\n            '</div>';\n    }\n\n    function renderLoadMore() {\n        if (!elements.loadMoreContainer) return;\n        elements.loadMoreContainer.style.display = state.hasMore ? 'flex' : 'none';\n        if (elements.loadMoreBtn) {\n            elements.loadMoreBtn.disabled = state.loading;\n            elements.loadMoreBtn.textContent = state.loading ? 'Loading...' : 'Load more';\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updateCountDisplay() {\n        if (!elements.count) return;\n        var total = state.allLoadedEvents.length;\n        var showing = state.events.length;\n\n        if (total === 0) {\n            elements.count.style.display = 'none';\n            return;\n        }\n\n        elements.count.style.display = 'block';\n        if (showing < total) {\n            elements.count.textContent = 'Showing ' + showing + ' of ' + total + ' loaded events';\n        } else {\n            elements.count.textContent = total + (state.hasMore ? '+' : '') + ' events';\n        }\n    }\n\n    function buildEventDescription(event, typeInfo) {\n        var detail = {};\n        if (event.detail_json) {\n            try { detail = JSON.parse(event.detail_json); } catch (e) {}\n        }\n\n        var description = typeInfo.description;\n        var replacements = {\n            '{person}': event.person || detail.person || 'Someone',\n            '{zone}': event.zone || detail.zone || 'the area',\n            '{from_zone}': detail.from_zone || 'previous zone',\n            '{to_zone}': detail.to_zone || 'next zone',\n            '{node}': detail.node || 'a node',\n            '{version}': detail.version || 'latest',\n            '{link}': detail.link || 'a link',\n            '{description}': detail.description || 'activity detected',\n            '{duration}': detail.duration || 'a while'\n        };\n\n        for (var placeholder in replacements) {\n            description = description.replace(placeholder, replacements[placeholder]);\n        }\n\n        return description;\n    }\n\n    function formatTimestamp(ms) {\n        var date = new Date(ms);\n        var now = new Date();\n        var isToday = date.toDateString() === now.toDateString();\n        var time = date.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });\n        return isToday ? time : (date.toLocaleDateString() + ' ' + time);\n    }\n\n    function escapeHtml(str) {\n        if (!str) return '';\n        return String(str)\n            .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')\n            .replace(/</g, '&lt;')\n            .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')\n            .replace(/\"/g, '&quot;');\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Event Handlers\n    // ============================================\n    function bindEventHandlers(eventEl) {\n        eventEl.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-timeline-action-btn').forEach(function(btn) {\n            btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                var action = btn.dataset.action;\n                var eventId = eventEl.dataset.id;\n                handleFeedback(eventId, action, eventEl);\n            });\n        });\n\n        eventEl.addEventListener('click', function() {\n            var timestamp = parseInt(this.dataset.timestamp, 10);\n            handleSeek(timestamp, this);\n        });\n    }\n\n    function handleFeedback(eventId, action, eventElement) {\n        var correct = action === 'correct';\n\n        if (window.Feedback) {\n            var event = state.allLoadedEvents.find(function(e) { return String(e.id) === String(eventId); });\n            if (event) {\n                var detail = {};\n                try { detail = event.detail_json ? JSON.parse(event.detail_json) : {}; } catch (e) {}\n\n                Feedback.sendFeedback(eventId, event.type, correct ? 'TRUE_POSITIVE' : 'FALSE_POSITIVE', detail);\n\n                eventElement.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-timeline-action-btn').forEach(function(btn) {\n                    if (btn.dataset.action === action) {\n                        btn.classList.add('active');\n                        setTimeout(function() { btn.classList.remove('active'); }, 2000);\n                    }\n                });\n\n                if (window.SpaxelApp && SpaxelApp.showToast) {\n                    SpaxelApp.showToast(correct ? || timestamp <= 0) return;\n\n        clearSelectedEvent();\n        if (eventEl) {\n            state.selectedEventId = eventEl.dataset.id;\n            eventEl.classList.add('selected');\n        }\n\n        if (window.SpaxelReplay) {\n            SpaxelReplay.jumpToTime(timestamp).then(function() {\n                updateNowReplayingChip(true, timestamp);\n                if            if (prev) prev.classList.remove('selected');\n            state.selectedEventId = null;\n        }\n    }\n\n    function updateNowReplayingChip(visible, timestampMs) {\n        var chip = === 'event') {\n            handleNewEvent(msg.event);\n        }\n    }\n\n    function handleNewEvent(event) {\n        var normalizedEvent = {\n            id: event.id || event.timestamp_ms || Date.now(),\n            timestamp_ms: event.timestamp_ms || event.ts || Date.now(),\n            type: event.type || event.kind || 'system',\n            zone: event.zone || '',\n            person: event.person || event.person_name || '',\n            blob_id: event.blob_id || event.blobID || 0,\n            detail_json: event.detail_json || '',\n            severity: event.severity || 'info'\n        };\n\n        // Only add if within the current server-side date range\n        if (state.serverSince) {\n            var sinceMs = new Date(state.serverSince).getTime();\n            if (normalizedEvent.timestamp_ms < sinceMs) return;\n        }\n        if (state.serverUntil) {\n            var untilMs = new Date(state.serverUntil).getTime();\n            if (normalizedEvent.timestamp_ms > untilMs) return;\n        }\n\n        state.allLoadedEvents.unshift(normalizedEvent);\n\n        if (state.allLoadedEvents.length > CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory) {\n            state.allLoadedEvents = state.allLoadedEvents.slice(0, CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory);\n        }\n\n        if (state.panelVisible && eventMatchesFilters(normalizedEvent)) {\n            state.events.unshift(normalizedEvent);\n            if (state.events.length > CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory) {\n                state.events = state.events.slice(0, CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory);\n            }\n            renderEvents();\n            updateCountDisplay();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // UI Updates\n    // ============================================\n    function updateLoadingState() {\n        if (!elements.loading) return;\n        elements.loading.style.display = state.loading ? Virtualization Setup\n266\t\t// ============================================\n267\t\tfunction setupVirtualization() {\n268\t\t\tif (!CONFIG.virtualization.enabled || !elements.eventsList) {\n269\t\t\t\treturn;\n270\t\t\t}\n271\t\n272\t\t\t// Create IntersectionObserver for lazy rendering\n273\t\t\tconst observerOptions = {\n274\t\t\t\troot: elements.eventsList,\n275\t\t\t\trootMargin: {\n285\t\t\t\telements.eventsList.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });\n286\t\t\t}\n287\t\n288\t\t\tconsole.log('[Timeline] Virtualization enabled with IntersectionObserver');\n289\t\t}\n290\t\n291\t\t// ============================================\n292\t\t// Intersection Observer Handler\n293\t\t// ============================================\n294\t\tfunction handleIntersection(entries) {\n295\t\t\tentries.forEach(function(entry) {\n296\t\t\t\tconst index = parseInt(entry.target.dataset.index, 10);\n297\t\t\t\tif (isNaN(index)) return;\n298\t\n299\t\t\t\tif (entry.isIntersecting) {\n300\t\t\t\t\tstate.virtualization.visibleIndices.add(index);\n301\t\t\t\t} else {\n302\t\t\t\t\tstate.virtualization.visibleIndices.delete(index);\n303\t\t\t\t}\n304\t\t\t});\n305\t\n306\t\t\t// Update rendered range based on visibility\n307\t\t\tupdateRenderedRange();\n308\t\t}\n309\t\n310\t\t// ============================================\n311\t\t// Scroll Handler for Virtualization\n312\t\t// ============================================\n313\t\tfunction onScroll() {\n314\t\t\tif (!elements.eventsList) return;\n315\t\n316\t\t\tstate.virtualization.scrollTop = elements.eventsList.scrollTop;\n317\t\n318\t\t\t// Update visible range based on scroll position\n319\t\t\tconst firstIndex = Math.floor(state.virtualization.scrollTop / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n320\t\t\tconst visibleCount = Math.ceil(elements.eventsList.clientHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n321\t\t\tconst lastIndex = firstIndex + visibleCount;\n322\t\n323\t\t\tstate.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = Math.max(0, firstIndex - CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n324\t\t\tstate.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.filteredEvents.length - 1, lastIndex + CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n325\t\n326\t\t\tupdateRenderedRange();\n327\t\t}\n328\t\n329\t\t// ============================================\n330\t\t// Update Rendered Range\n331\t\t// ============================================\n332\t\tfunction updateRenderedRange() {\n333\t\t\tif state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex);\n337\t\n338\t\t\t// Unobserve items that are no longer in range\n339\t\t\tstate.virtualization.renderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n340\t\t\t\tif (index < firstIdx || index > lastIdx) {\n341\t\t\t\t\tconst item = elements.eventsList.querySelector('[data-index=\"' + index + '\"]');\n342\t\t\t\t\tif (item && state.virtualization.observer) {\n343\t\t\t\t\t\tstate.virtualization.observer.unobserve(item);\n344\t\t\t\t\t}\n345\t\t\t\t}\n346\t\t\t});\n347\t\n348\t\t\t// Create new set of rendered indices\n349\t\t\tconst newRenderedIndices = index);\n362\t\t\t\t\t\tconst newEventEl = tempDiv.firstElementChild;\n363\t\t\t\t\t\tif (newEventEl) {\n364\t\t\t\t\t\t\tnewEventEl.dataset.index = index;\n365\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfragment.appendChild(newEventEl);\n366\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n367\t\t\t\t\t}\n368\t\t\t\t} else {\n369\t\t\t\t\t// Keep existing item in rendered set\n370\t\t\t\t\tnewRenderedIndices.add(index);\n371\t\t\t\t}\n372\t\t\t});\n373\t\n374\t\t\tif (fragment.children.length > 0) {\n375\t\t\t\telements.eventsList.appendChild(fragment);\n376\t\n377\t\t\t\t// Bind handlers for new items\n378\t\t\t\tArray.from(fragment.children).forEach(function(item) {\n379\t\t\t\t\tbindEventHandlersForElement(item);\n380\t\t\t\t\tif (state.virtualization.observer) {\n381\t\t\t\t\t\tstate.virtualization.observer.observe(item);\n382\t\t\t\t\t}\n383\t\t\t\t});\n384\t\t\t}\n385\t\n386\t\t\t// Remove items that are no longer in rendered range\n387\t\t\tstate.virtualization.renderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n388\t\t\t\tif (!newRenderedIndices.has(index)) {\n389\t\t\t\t\tconst item = {\n391\t\t\t\t\t\titem.remove();\n392\t\t\t\t\t}\n393\t\t\t\t}\n394\t\t\t});\n395\t\n396\t\t\tstate.virtualization.renderedIndices = newRenderedIndices;\n397\t\n398\t\t\t// Update total height for spacer\n399\t\t\tupdateVirtualSpacers();\n400\t\t}\n401\t\n402\t\t// ============================================\n403\t\t// Update Virtual Spacers\n404\t\t// ============================================\n405\t\tfunction updateVirtualSpacers() {\n406\t\t\tif (!elements.eventsList) return;\n407\t\n408\t\t\tconst totalHeight = state.filteredEvents.length * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n409\t\t\tstate.virtualization.totalHeight = totalHeight;\n410\t\n411\t\t\t// Add top spacer if needed\n412\t\t\tlet topSpacer = 1) * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n428\t\t\tbottomSpacer.style.height = Math.max(0, remainingHeight) + 'px';\n429\t\t}\n430\t\n431\t\tfunction cacheElements() {\n432\t\t\telements = {\n433\t\t\t\tcontainer: container = elements.container;\n535\t\t\tif (!container) return;\n536\t\n537\t\t\tif (newMode === 'ambient') {\n538\t\t\t\tstate.dashboardMode = 'ambient';\n539\t\t\t} else {\n540\t\t\t\tstate.dashboardMode = 'live';\n541\t\t\t}\n542\t\n543\t\t\tif (newMode === 'timeline') {\n544\t\t\t\t// Container is shown by inline script, just load events if needed\n545\t\t\t\tif (state.allLoadedEvents.length === 0) {\n546\t\t\t\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n547\t\t\t\t} else {\n548\t\t\t\t\t// Reload events with new mode\n549\t\t\t\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n550\t\t\t\t}\n551\t\t\t}\n552\t\t}\n553\t\n554\t\t// ============================================\n555\t\t// Event Loading\n556\t\t// ============================================\n557\t\tfunction loadInitialEvents() {\n558\t\t\tconst params = new URLSearchParams();\n559\t\t\tparams.set('limit', CONFIG.initialLoadLimit);\n560\t\n561\t\t\tapplyFiltersToParams(params);\n562\t\n563\t\t\tconst url = '/api/events?' + params.toString();\n564\t\t\tfetchEvents(url, true);\n565\t\t}\n566\t\n567\t\tfunction loadMoreEvents() {\n568\t\t\tif (state.loading || !state.cursor) {\n569\t\t\t\treturn;\n570\t\t\t}\n571\t\n572\t\t\tconst params = new URLSearchParams();\n573\t\t\tparams.set('limit', CONFIG.initialLoadLimit);\n574\t\t\tif (state.cursor) {\n575\t\t\t\tparams.set('before', state.cursor);\n576\t\t\t}\n577\t\n578\t\t\tapplyFiltersToParams(params);\n579\t\n580\t\t\tconst url = '/api/events?' + params.toString();\n581\t\t\tfetchEvents(url, false);\n582\t\t}\n583\t\n584\t\tfunction fetchEvents(url, isInitial) {\n585\t\t\tstate.loading = true;\n586\t\t\tupdateLoadingState();\n587\t\n588\t\t\tfetch(url)\n589\t\t\t\t.then(function(res) {\n590\t\t\t\t\tif (!res.ok) {\n591\t\t\t\t\t\tthrow new Error('Failed to fetch events: ' + res.statusText);\n592\t\t\t\t\t}\n593\t\t\t\t\treturn res.json();\n594\t\t\t\t})\n595\t\t\t\t.then(function(data) {\n596\t\t\t\t\tif (isInitial) {\n597\t\t\t\t\t\tstate.allLoadedEvents = [];\n598\t\t\t\t\t\tstate.filteredEvents = [];\n599\t\t\t\t\t}\n600\t\n601\t\t\t\t\t// Append to all loaded events\n602\t\t\t\t\tstate.allLoadedEvents = state.allLoadedEvents.concat(data.events || []);\n603\t\t\t\t\tstate.cursor = data.cursor || null;\n604\t\t\t\t\tstate.total = data.total_filtered || 0;\n605\t\n606\t\t\t\t\t// Update filter options with new data\n607\t\t\t\t\tupdateFilterOptions(data.events);\n608\t\n609\t\t\t\t\t// Apply client-side filters\n610\t\t\t\t\tapplyClientSideFilters();\n611\t\n612\t\t\t\t\tupdateLoadMoreButton();\n613\t\t\t\t})\n614\t\t\t\t.catch(function(err) {\n615\t\t\t\t\tconsole.error('[Timeline] Failed to load events:', err);\n616\t\t\t\t\tstate.error = err.message;\n617\t\t\t\t\tshowError(err.message);\n618\t\t\t\t})\n619\t\t\t\t.finally(function() {\n620\t\t\t\t\tstate.loading = false;\n621\t\t\t\t\tupdateLoadingState();\n622\t\t\t\t});\n623\t\t}\n624\t\n625\t\t// ============================================\n626\t\t// Filter Handling\n627\t\t// ============================================\n628\t\tfunction onFilterChange() {\n629\t\t\t// Update filter state\n630\t\t\tif (elements.filterType) {\n631\t\t\t\tconst value = checkboxes when specific type selected\n636\t\t\t\t\tdisableCategoryCheckboxes(true);\n637\t\t\t\t} else {\n638\t\t\t\t\tstate.filters.type = null;\n644\t\t\t}\n645\t\t\tif (elements.filterPerson) {\n646\t\t\t\tstate.filters.person = elements.filterPerson.value || null;\n647\t\t\t}\n648\t\n649\t\t\t// Reload events with new server-side filters\n650\t\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n651\t\t}\n652\t\n653\t\tfunction onTimeFilterChange() {\n654\t\t\tif (!elements.filterTime) return;\n655\t\n656\t\t\tconst value = elements.filterTime.value;\n657\t\n658\t\t\t// Hide/show custom date container\n659\t\t\tif (elements.customDateContainer) {\n660\t\t\t\tif (value === 'custom') {\n661\t\t\t\t\telements.customDateContainer.style.display = 'flex';\n662\t\t\t\t} else {\n663\t\t\t\t\telements.customDateContainer.style.display = 'none';\n664\t\t\t\t}\n665\t\t\t}\n666\t\n667\t\t\tif (value === 'today') {\n668\t\t\t\tconst today = new Date();\n669\t\t\t\ttoday.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);\n670\t\t\t\tstate.filters.after = today.toISOString();\n671\t\t\t\tstate.filters.until = null;\n672\t\t\t} else if (value === '7d') {\n673\t\t\t\tconst weekAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);\n674\t\t\t\tstate.filters.after = weekAgo.toISOString();\n675\t\t\t\tstate.filters.until = null;\n676\t\t\t} else if (value === '30d') {\n677\t\t\t\tconst monthAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);\n678\t\t\t\tstate.filters.after = monthAgo.toISOString();\n679\t\t\t\tstate.filters.until = null;\n680\t\t\t} else if (value === 'custom') {\n681\t\t\t\t// Wait for user to apply custom range\n682\t\t\t\treturn;\n683\t\t\t} else {\n684\t\t\t\tstate.filters.after = null;\n685\t\t\t\tstate.filters.until = null;\n686\t\t\t}\n687\t\n688\t\t\t// Reload events with new date range\n689\t\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n690\t\t}\n691\t\n692\t\tfunction applyCustomDateRange() {\n693\t\t\tif (!elements.dateFrom || !elements.dateTo) return;\n694\t\n695\t\t\tconst fromDate = new Date(elements.dateFrom.value);\n696\t\t\tconst toDate = new Date(elements.dateTo.value);\n697\t\n698\t\t\tif (isNaN(fromDate.getTime()) || isNaN(toDate.getTime())) {\n699\t\t\t\tif (window.SpaxelApp && SpaxelApp.showToast) {\n700\t\t\t\t\tSpaxelApp.showToast('Invalid date range', 'warning');\n701\t\t\t\t}\n702\t\t\t\treturn;\n703\t\t\t}\n704\t\n705\t\t\t// Set to start of from day and end of to day\n706\t\t\tfromDate.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);\n707\t\t\ttoDate.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);\n708\t\n709\t\t\tstate.filters.after = fromDate.toISOString();\n710\t\t\tstate.filters.until = toDate.toISOString();\n711\t\n712\t\t\t// Reload events with custom date range\n713\t\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n714\t\t}\n715\t\n716\t\tfunction onSearchChange() {\n717\t\t\tif (elements.filterSearch) {\n718\t\t\t\tstate.filters.q = elements.filterSearch.value.trim() || null;\n719\t\t\t\tapplyClientSideFilters();\n720\t\t\t}\n721\t\t}\n722\t\n723\t\t// Fuzzy match: checks if all characters in query appear in text in order.\n724\t\t// \"ktchn\" matches \"kitchen\", \"alce\" matches \"alice\", etc.\n725\t\t// Returns a score (lower = better match) or -1 if no match.\n726\t\tfunction fuzzyMatch(query, text) {\n727\t\t\tif (!query || !text) return -1;\n728\t\t\tquery = query.toLowerCase();\n729\t\t\ttext = text.toLowerCase();\n730\t\n731\t\t\t// Fast path: exact substring match\n732\t\t\tvar idx = text.indexOf(query);\n733\t\t\tif (idx !== -1) return idx;\n734\t\n735\t\t\t// Character-sequence matching\n736\t\t\tvar qi = 0;\n737\t\t\tvar score = 0;\n738\t\t\tvar lastMatchIdx = -1;\n739\t\n740\t\t\tfor (var ti = 0; ti < text.length && qi < query.length; ti++) {\n741\t\t\t\tif (text[ti] === query[qi]) {\n742\t\t\t\t\tscore += (lastMatchIdx === ti - 1) ? 0 : 1;\n743\t\t\t\t\tlastMatchIdx = ti;\n744\t\t\t\t\tqi++;\n745\t\t\t\t}\n746\t\t\t}\n747\t\n748\t\t\treturn qi === query.length ? score : -1;\n749\t\t}\n750\t\n751\t\t// Multi-word fuzzy match: splits query into tokens, all must match.\n752\t\t// \"alice kit\" matches \"Alice entered Kitchen\" (both tokens match).\n753\t\tfunction fuzzyMatchAll(query, text) {\n754\t\t\tif (!query || !text) return false;\n755\t\t\tvar tokens = query.toLowerCase().split(/\\s+/).filter(function(t) { return t.length > 0; });\n756\t\t\tif (tokens.length === 0) return true;\n757\t\t\tvar textLower = text.toLowerCase();\n758\t\t\treturn tokens.every(function(token) {\n759\t\t\t\treturn fuzzyMatch(token, textLower) >= 0;\n760\t\t\t});\n761\t\t}\n762\t\n763\t\tfunction disableCategoryCheckboxes(disabled) {\n764\t\t\tconst checkboxes = [\n765\t\t\t\telements.categoryPresence,\n766\t\t\t\telements.categoryZones,\n767\t\t\t\telements.categoryAlerts,\n768\t\t\t\telements.categorySystem,\n769\t\t\t\telements.categoryLearning\n770\t\t\t];\n771\t\t\tcheckboxes.forEach(function(cb) {\n772\t\t\t\tif (cb) {\n773\t\t\t\t\tcb.disabled = disabled;\n774\t\t\t\t\tif (disabled) {\n775\t\t\t\t\t\tcb.parentElement.style.opacity = '0.5';\n776\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n777\t\t\t\t\t\tcb.parentElement.style.opacity = '1';\n778\t\t\t\t\t}\n779\t\t\t\t}\n780\t\t\t});\n781\t\t}\n782\t\n783\t\t// ============================================\n784\t\t// Client-Side Filtering\n785\t\t// ============================================\n786\t\tfunction applyClientSideFilters() {\n787\t\t\t// Start with all loaded events\n788\t\t\tlet filtered = state.allLoadedEvents.slice();\n789\t\n790\t\t\t// Apply category filters\n791\t\t\tif (!state.filters.type) {\n792\t\t\t\tconst enabledCategories = Object.keys(state.filters.categories).filter(\n793\t\t\t\t\tfunction(cat) { return state.filters.categories[cat]; }\n794\t\t\t\t);\n795\t\n796\t\t\t\tconst allowedTypes = new Set();\n797\t\t\t\tenabledCategories.forEach(function(cat) {\n798\t\t\t\t\tconst types = EVENT_CATEGORIES[cat];\n799\t\t\t\t\tif (types) {\n800\t\t\t\t\t\ttypes.forEach(function(t) { allowedTypes.add(t); });\n801\t\t\t\t\t}\n802\t\t\t\t});\n803\t\n804\t\t\t\tif (allowedTypes.size > 0) {\n805\t\t\t\t\tfiltered = filtered.filter(function(event) {\n806\t\t\t\t\t\treturn allowedTypes.has(event.type);\n807\t\t\t\t\t});\n808\t\t\t\t}\n809\t\t\t} else {\n810\t\t\t\t// Specific type filter\n811\t\t\t\tfiltered = filtered.filter(function(event) {\n812\t\t\t\t\treturn event.type === state.filters.type;\n813\t\t\t\t});\n814\t\t\t}\n815\t\n816\t\t\t// Apply zone filter\n817\t\t\tif (state.filters.zone) {\n818\t\t\t\tfiltered = filtered.filter(function(event) {\n819\t\t\t\t\treturn event.zone === state.filters.zone;\n820\t\t\t\t});\n821\t\t\t}\n822\t\n823\t\t\t// Apply person filter\n824\t\t\tif (state.filters.person) {\n825\t\t\t\tfiltered = filtered.filter(function(event) {\n826\t\t\t\t\treturn event.person === state.filters.person;\n827\t\t\t\t});\n828\t\t\t}\n829\t\n830\t\t\t// Apply text search with fuzzy matching\n831\t\t\tif (state.filters.q) {\n832\t\t\t\tconst query = state.filters.q;\n833\t\t\t\tfiltered = filtered.filter(function(event) {\n834\t\t\t\t\tvar searchParts = [event.type || '', event.zone || '', event.person || ''];\n835\t\t\t\t\tif (event.detail_json) {\n836\t\t\t\t\t\ttry {\n837\t\t\t\t\t\t\tvar detail = JSON.parse(event.detail_json);\n838\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (detail.description) searchParts.push(detail.description);\n839\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (detail.message) searchParts.push(detail.message);\n840\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsearchParts.push(JSON.stringify(detail));\n841\t\t\t\t\t\t} catch (e) {\n842\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsearchParts.push(event.detail_json);\n843\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n844\t\t\t\t\t}\n845\t\t\t\t\tvar combinedText = searchParts.join(' ');\n846\t\t\t\t\treturn fuzzyMatchAll(query, combinedText);\n847\t\t\t\t});\n848\t\t\t}\n849\t\n850\t\t\t// Sort by timestamp descending\n851\t\t\tfiltered.sort(function(a, b) {\n852\t\t\t\treturn b.timestamp_ms - a.timestamp_ms;\n853\t\t\t});\n854\t\n855\t\t\tstate.filteredEvents = filtered;\n856\t\t\trenderEvents();\n857\t\t}\n858\t\n859\t\tfunction applyFiltersToParams(params) {\n860\t\t\t// Server-side filters\n861\t\t\tif (state.filters.type) {\n862\t\t\t\tparams.set('type', state.filters.type);\n863\t\t\t} else {\n864\t\t\t\t// Send category-based types filter to server for efficient initial loading\n865\t\t\t\tvar enabledTypes = getEnabledCategoryTypes();\n866\t\t\t\tvar allTypes = getAllCategoryTypes();\n867\t\t\t\tif (enabledTypes.length > 0 && enabledTypes.length < allTypes.length) {\n868\t\t\t\t\tparams.set('types', enabledTypes.join(','));\n869\t\t\t\t}\n870\t\t\t}\n871\t\t\tif (state.filters.zone) {\n872\t\t\t\tparams.set('zone', state.filters.zone);\n873\t\t\t}\n874\t\t\tif (state.filters.person) {\n875\t\t\t\tparams.set('person', state.filters.person);\n876\t\t\t}\n877\t\t\tif (state.filters.after) {\n878\t\t\t\tparams.set('since', state.filters.q);\n885\t\t\t}\n886\t\t\t// Add mode parameter based on dashboard mode\n887\t\t\tparams.set('mode', state.dashboardMode);\n888\t\t}\n889\t\n890\t\tfunction getEnabledCategoryTypes() {\n891\t\t\tvar types = [];\n892\t\t\tObject.keys(state.filters.categories).forEach(function(cat) {\n893\t\t\t\tif (state.filters.categories[cat]) {\n894\t\t\t\t\tvar catTypes = EVENT_CATEGORIES[cat];\n895\t\t\t\t\tif (catTypes) {\n896\t\t\t\t\t\tcatTypes.forEach(function(t) {\n897\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (types.indexOf(t) === -1) [];\n907\t\t\tObject.keys(EVENT_CATEGORIES).forEach(function(cat) {\n908\t\t\t\tEVENT_CATEGORIES[cat].forEach(function(t) {\n909\t\t\t\t\tif (types.indexOf(t) === -1) types.push(t);\n910\t\t\t\t});\n911\t\t\t});\n912\t\t\treturn types;\n913\t\t}\n914\t\n915\t\t// ============================================\n916\t\t// WebSocket Message Handler\n917\t\t// ============================================\n918\t\tfunction handleWebSocketMessage(msg) {\n919\t\t\tif (msg.type === 'event') {\n920\t\t\t\thandleNewEvent(msg.event);\n921\t\t\t}\n922\t\t}\n923\t\n924\t\tfunction handleNewEvent(event) {\n925\t\t\tconsole.log('[Timeline] New event:', event);\n926\t\n927\t\t\t// Normalize event format (live events use ts/kind/person_name, DB events use timestamp_ms/type/person)\n928\t\t\tconst normalizedEvent = {\n929\t\t\t\tid: event.id || event.timestamp_ms || Date.now(),\n930\t\t\t\ttimestamp_ms: event.timestamp_ms || event.ts || Date.now(),\n931\t\t\t\ttype: event.type || event.kind || 'system',\n932\t\t\t\tzone: event.zone || '',\n933\t\t\t\tperson: 'info'\n937\t\t\t};\n938\t\n939\t\t\t// Add to beginning of all loaded events\n940\t\t\tstate.allLoadedEvents.unshift(normalizedEvent);\n941\t\t\tstate.total++;\n942\t\n943\t\t\t// Update filter {\n948\t\t\t\tstate.availableZones.add(normalizedEvent.zone);\n949\t\t\t}\n950\t\t\tif (normalizedEvent.person) {\n951\t\t\t\tstate.availablePersons.add(normalizedEvent.person);\n952\t\t\t}\n953\t\n954\t\t\t// Apply client-side filters to update displayed events\n955\t\t\tapplyClientSideFilters();\n956\t\n957\t\t\t// Prepend to DOM if timeline is visible and event passes filters\n958\t\t\tif (elements.container && elements.container.style.display !== 'none' && elements.eventsList) {\n959\t\t\t\t// Check if event passes current filters\n960\t\t\t\tconst passesFilters = state.filteredEvents.some(function(e) { return e.id === normalizedEvent.id; });\n961\t\n962\t\t\t\tif (!passesFilters) return; // Don't show if filtered out\n963\t\n964\t\t\t\telements.empty.style.display = 'none';\n965\t\n966\t\t\t\tconst tempDiv = tempDiv.firstElementChild;\n969\t\n970\t\t\t\telements.eventsList.insertBefore(newEventEl, elements.eventsList.firstChild);\n971\t\n972\t\t\t\t// Bind handlers for the new {\n977\t\t\t\t\tnewEventEl.classList.remove('new-event');\n978\t\t\t\t}, 300);\n979\t\n980\t\t\t\t// Limit DOM elements (keep only most recent 100 in DOM)\n981\t\t\t\twhile (elements.eventsList.children.length > 100) {\n982\t\t\t\t\tconst lastChild = elements.eventsList.lastElementChild;\n983\t\t\t\t\tif (lastChild && !lastChild.classList.contains('timeline-spacer')) {\n986\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n987\t\t\t\t\t}\n988\t\t\t\t}\n989\t\n990\t\t\t\tupdateFilterOptions();\n991\t\t\t}\n992\t\t}\n993\t\n994\t\t// Bind handlers for a single event element\n995\t\tfunction === 0) {\n1038\t\t\t\telements.eventsList.innerHTML = '';\n1039\t\t\t\tif (elements.empty) {\n1040\t\t\t\t\telements.empty.style.display = 'block';\n1041\t\t\t\t}\n1042\t\t\t\tif (elements.error) batch\n1096\t\t\tupdateRenderedRange();\n1097\t\t}\n1098\t\n1099\t\tfunction renderEvent(event, isNew, index) {\n1100\t\t\tconst info = eventTypeInfo[event.type] || eventTypeInfo.system;\n1101\t\t\tconst timeStr = formatTimestamp(event.timestamp_ms);\n1102\t\t\tconst personStr = event.person ? escapeHtml(event.person) : '';\n1103\t\t\tconst zoneStr = event.zone ? escapeHtml(event.zone) : '';\n1104\t\t\tconst description = buildEventDescription(event);\n1105\t\n1106\t\t\t// Severity indicator for alerts\n1107\t\t\tconst severityClass = event.severity === 'alert' || event.severity === 'critical' ? ' severity-critical' : '';\n1108\t\t\tconst newClass = isNew ? ' new-event' : '';\n1109\t\n1110\t\t\t// Determine if this is a system event (for secondary styling)\n1111\t\t\t// System events: node_online, node_offline, ota_update, baseline_changed, system, learning_milestone, anomaly_learned\n1112\t\t\tconst systemEventTypes = ['node_online', 'node_offline', 'ota_update', 'baseline_changed', 'system', 'learning_milestone', 'anomaly_learned'];\n1113\t\t\tconst isSystemEvent = systemEventTypes.indexOf(event.type) !== -1;\n1114\t\t\tconst secondaryClass = isSystemEvent ? ' secondary' : '';\n1115\t\n1116\t\t\t// Check if this event has a blob_id for explainability\n1117\t\t\tconst hasBlobId = event.blob_id !== undefined && event.blob_id !== null && event.blob_id !== 0;\n1118\t\t\tconst explainabilityBtn = hasBlobId ? `\n1119\t\t\t\t<button class=\"timeline-explain-btn\" data-blob-id=\"${event.blob_id}\" title=\"Why is this here?\">\n1120\t\t\t\t\t<svg y2=\"17\"></line>\n1124\t\t\t\t\t</svg>\n1125\t\t\t\t</button>\n1126\t\t\t` : '';\n1127\t\n1128\t\t\tconst dataIndex = index !== undefined ? ` data-index=\"${index}\"` : '';\n1129\t\n1130\t\t\treturn `\n1131\t\t\t\t<div class=\"timeline-event timeline-${event.type}${severityClass}${newClass}${secondaryClass}\" data-type=\"${event.type}\" data-id=\"${event.id}\" data-timestamp=\"${event.timestamp_ms}\" data-blob-id=\"${event.blob_id || ''}\"${dataIndex}>\n1132\t\t\t\t\t<div class=\"timeline-event-icon\">${info.icon}</div>\n1133\t\t\t\t\t<div class=\"timeline-event-content\">\n1134\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class=\"timeline-event-header\">\n1135\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class=\"timeline-event-title\">${description}</div>\n1136\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n1137\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class=\"timeline-event-meta\">\n1138\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class=\"timeline-feedback-btn positive\" data-action=\"correct\" title=\"Correct\">👍</button>\n1145\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class=\"timeline-feedback-btn negative\" data-action=\"incorrect\" title=\"Incorrect\">👎</button>\n1146\t\t\t\t\t\t${explainabilityBtn}\n1147\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class=\"timeline-seek-btn\" title=\"Jump to this moment\">\n1148\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\">\n1149\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<polygon points=\"5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3\"></polygon>\n1150\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</svg>\n1151\t\t\t\t\t\t</button>\n1152\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n1153\t\t\t\t</div>\n1154\t\t\t`;\n1155\t\t}\n1156\t\n1157\t\tfunction buildEventDescription(event) {\n1158\t\t\tconst info = eventTypeInfo[event.type] || eventTypeInfo.system;\n1159\t\t\tconst base = info.description;\n1160\t\n1161\t\t\t// Parse detail_json for additional context\n1162\t\t\tlet
