============================================\n\tfunction init() {\n\t\tconsole.log('[Timeline] Initializing');\n\n\t\tcacheElements();\n\t\tbindEvents();\n\t\tsetupVirtualization();\n\n\t\t// Listen for route changes to show/hide timeline\n\t\tif (window.SpaxelRouter) {\n\t\t\tSpaxelRouter.onModeChange(onModeChange);\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Listen for WebSocket event messages\n\t\tif (window.SpaxelApp) {\n\t\t\tSpaxelApp.registerMessageHandler(handleWebSocketMessage);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// Virtualization Setup\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction setupVirtualization() {\n\t\tif (!CONFIG.virtualization.enabled || !elements.eventsList) {\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Create IntersectionObserver for lazy rendering\n\t\tconst observerOptions = {\n\t\t\troot: elements.eventsList,\n\t\t\trootMargin: CONFIG.virtualization.rootMargin,\n\t\t\tthreshold: CONFIG.virtualization.threshold\n\t\t};\n\n\t\tstate.virtualization.observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {\n\t\t\thandleIntersection(entries);\n\t\t}, observerOptions);\n\n\t\t// Set up scroll listener for virtualization\n\t\tif (elements.eventsList) {\n\t\t\telements.eventsList.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconsole.log('[Timeline] Virtualization enabled with IntersectionObserver');\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// Intersection Observer Handler\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction handleIntersection(entries) {\n\t\tentries.forEach(function(entry) {\n\t\t\tconst index = parseInt(entry.target.dataset.index, 10);\n\t\t\tif (isNaN(index)) return;\n\n\t\t\tif (entry.isIntersecting) {\n\t\t\t\tstate.virtualization.visibleIndices.add(index);\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tstate.virtualization.visibleIndices.delete(index);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t});\n\n\t\t// Update rendered range based on visibility\n\t\tupdateRenderedRange();\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// Scroll Handler for Virtualization\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction onScroll() {\n\t\tif (!elements.eventsList) return;\n\n\t\tstate.virtualization.scrollTop = elements.eventsList.scrollTop;\n\n\t\t// Update visible range based on scroll position\n\t\tconst firstIndex = Math.floor(state.virtualization.scrollTop / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n\t\tconst visibleCount = Math.ceil(elements.eventsList.clientHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n\t\tconst lastIndex = firstIndex + visibleCount;\n\n\t\tstate.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = Math.max(0, firstIndex - CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n\t\tstate.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.filteredEvents.length - 1, lastIndex + CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n\n\t\tupdateRenderedRange();\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// Update Rendered Range\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction updateRenderedRange() {\n\t\tif (!state.filteredEvents.length) return;\n\n\t\tconst firstIdx = Math.max(0, state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex);\n\t\tconst lastIdx = Math.min(state.filteredEvents.length - 1, state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex);\n\n\t\t// Unobserve items that are no longer in range\n\t\tstate.virtualization.renderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n\t\t\tif (index < firstIdx || index > lastIdx) {\n\t\t\t\tconst item = elements.eventsList.querySelector('[data-index=\"' + index + '\"]');\n\t\t\t\tif (item && state.virtualization.observer) {\n\t\t\t\t\tstate.virtualization.observer.unobserve(item);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t});\n\n\t\t// Create new set of rendered indices\n\t\tconst newRenderedIndices = new Set();\n\t\tfor (let i = firstIdx; i <= lastIdx; i++) {\n\t\t\tnewRenderedIndices.add(i);\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Render new items and observe them\n\t\tconst fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();\n\t\tnewRenderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n\t\t\tif (!state.virtualization.renderedIndices.has(index)) {\n\t\t\t\tconst event = state.filteredEvents[index];\n\t\t\t\tif (event) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst tempDiv = document.createElement('div');\n\t\t\t\t\ttempDiv.innerHTML = renderEvent(event, false, index);\n\t\t\t\t\tconst newEventEl = tempDiv.firstElementChild;\n\t\t\t\t\tif (newEventEl) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnewEventEl.dataset.index = index;\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfragment.appendChild(newEventEl);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t// Keep existing item in rendered set\n\t\t\t\tnewRenderedIndices.add(index);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t});\n\n\t\tif (fragment.children.length > 0) {\n\t\t\telements.eventsList.appendChild(fragment);\n\n\t\t\t// Bind handlers for new items\n\t\t\tArray.from(fragment.children).forEach(function(item) {\n\t\t\t\tbindEventHandlersForElement(item);\n\t\t\t\tif (state.virtualization.observer) {\n\t\t\t\t\tstate.virtualization.observer.observe(item);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Remove items that are no longer in rendered range\n\t\tstate.virtualization.renderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n\t\t\tif (!newRenderedIndices.has(index)) {\n\t\t\t\tconst item = elements.eventsList.querySelector('[data-index=\"' + index + '\"]');\n\t\t\t\tif (item) {\n\t\t\t\t\titem.remove();\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t});\n\n\t\tstate.virtualization.renderedIndices = newRenderedIndices;\n\n\t\t// Update total height for spacer\n\t\tupdateVirtualSpacers();\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// Update Virtual Spacers\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction updateVirtualSpacers() {\n\t\tif (!elements.eventsList) return;\n\n\t\tconst totalHeight = state.filteredEvents.length * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n\t\tstate.virtualization.totalHeight = totalHeight;\n\n\t\t// Add top spacer if needed\n\t\tlet topSpacer = elements.eventsList.querySelector('.timeline-spacer-top');\n\t\tif (!topSpacer) {\n\t\t\ttopSpacer = document.createElement('div');\n\t\t\ttopSpacer.className = 'timeline-spacer timeline-spacer-top';\n\t\t\telements.eventsList.insertBefore(topSpacer, elements.eventsList.firstChild);\n\t\t}\n\t\ttopSpacer.style.height = (state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex * CONFIG.itemHeight) + 'px';\n\n\t\t// Add bottom spacer if needed\n\t\tlet bottomSpacer = elements.eventsList.querySelector('.timeline-spacer-bottom');\n\t\tif (!bottomSpacer) {\n\t\t\tbottomSpacer = document.createElement('div');\n\t\t\tbottomSpacer.className = 'timeline-spacer timeline-spacer-bottom';\n\t\t\telements.eventsList.appendChild(bottomSpacer);\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst remainingHeight = (state.filteredEvents.length - state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex - 1) * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n\t\tbottomSpacer.style.height = Math.max(0, remainingHeight) + 'px';\n\t}\n\n\tfunction cacheElements() {\n\t\telements = {\n\t\t\tcontainer: document.getElementById('timeline-view'),\n\t\t\teventsList: document.getElementById('timeline-events'),\n\t\t\tfilterType: document.getElementById('timeline-filter-type'),\n\t\t\tfilterZone: document.getElementById('timeline-filter-zone'),\n\t\t\tfilterPerson: document.getElementById('timeline-filter-person'),\n\t\t\tfilterTime: document.getElementById('timeline-filter-time'),\n\t\t\tfilterSearch: document.getElementById('timeline-filter-search'),\n\t\t\tloading: document.getElementById('timeline-loading'),\n\t\t\tempty: document.getElementById('timeline-empty'),\n\t\t\terror: document.getElementById('timeline-error'),\n\t\t\tloadMore: document.getElementById('timeline-load-more'),\n\t\t\tloadMoreBtn: document.getElementById('timeline-load-more-btn'),\n\t\t\t// Category checkboxes\n\t\t\tcategoryPresence: document.getElementById('timeline-category-presence'),\n\t\t\tcategoryZones: document.getElementById('timeline-category-zones'),\n\t\t\tcategoryAlerts: document.getElementById('timeline-category-alerts'),\n\t\t\tcategorySystem: document.getElementById('timeline-category-system'),\n\t\t\tcategoryLearning: document.getElementById('timeline-category-learning'),\n\t\t\t// Custom date range inputs\n\t\t\tcustomDateContainer: document.getElementById('timeline-custom-date-container'),\n\t\t\tdateFrom: document.getElementById('timeline-date-from'),\n\t\t\tdateTo: document.getElementById('timeline-date-to'),\n\t\t\tdateApply: document.getElementById('timeline-date-apply'),\n\t\t\t// Filter bar toggle\n\t\t\tfilterToggle: document.getElementById('timeline-filter-toggle'),\n\t\t\tfilterBar: document.getElementById('timeline-filter-bar'),\n\t\t\t// Now replaying chip\n\t\t\tnowReplayingChip: document.getElementById('timeline-now-replaying')\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\n\tfunction bindEvents() {\n\t\t// Category checkboxes\n\t\tconst categoryInputs = [\n\t\t\t{ el: elements.categoryPresence, key: 'presence' },\n\t\t\t{ el: elements.categoryZones, key: 'zones' },\n\t\t\t{ el: elements.categoryAlerts, key: 'alerts' },\n\t\t\t{ el: elements.categorySystem, key: 'system' },\n\t\t\t{ el: elements.categoryLearning, key: 'learning' }\n\t\t];\n\t\tcategoryInputs.forEach(function(item) {\n\t\t\tif (item.el) {\n\t\t\t\titem.el.addEventListener('change', function() {\n\t\t\t\t\tstate.filters.categories[item.key] = item.el.checked;\n\t\t\t\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t});\n\n\t\t// Filter dropdowns\n\t\tif (elements.filterType) {\n\t\t\telements.filterType.addEventListener('change', onFilterChange);\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (elements.filterZone) {\n\t\t\telements.filterZone.addEventListener('change', onFilterChange);\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (elements.filterPerson) {\n\t\t\telements.filterPerson.addEventListener('change', onFilterChange);\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (elements.filterTime) {\n\t\t\telements.filterTime.addEventListener('change', onTimeFilterChange);\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (elements.filterSearch) {\n\t\t\tlet searchTimeout;\n\t\t\telements.filterSearch.addEventListener('input', function() {\n\t\t\t\tclearTimeout(searchTimeout);\n\t\t\t\tsearchTimeout = setTimeout(onSearchChange, CONFIG.debounceMs);\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t// Enter key triggers server-side FTS5 search\n\t\t\telements.filterSearch.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {\n\t\t\t\tif (e.key === 'Enter') {\n\t\t\t\t\te.preventDefault();\n\t\t\t\t\tclearTimeout(searchTimeout);\n\t\t\t\t\tstate.filters.q = elements.filterSearch.value.trim() || null;\n\t\t\t\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Custom date range\n\t\tif (elements.dateApply) {\n\t\t\telements.dateApply.addEventListener('click', applyCustomDateRange);\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Load more button\n\t\tif (elements.loadMoreBtn) {\n\t\t\telements.loadMoreBtn.addEventListener('click', loadMoreEvents);\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Filter bar toggle\n\t\tif (elements.filterToggle) {\n\t\t\telements.filterToggle.addEventListener('click', function() {\n\t\t\t\telements.filterBar.classList.toggle('collapsed');\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// Mode Change Handler\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction onModeChange(newMode, oldMode) {\n\t\tconst container = elements.container;\n\t\tif (!container) return;\n\n\t\tif (newMode === 'ambient') {\n\t\t\tstate.dashboardMode = 'ambient';\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tstate.dashboardMode = 'live';\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif (newMode === 'timeline') {\n\t\t\t// Container is shown by inline script, just load events if needed\n\t\t\tif (state.allLoadedEvents.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t// Reload events with new mode\n\t\t\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// Event Loading\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction loadInitialEvents() {\n\t\tconst params = new URLSearchParams();\n\t\tparams.set('limit', CONFIG.initialLoadLimit);\n\n\t\tapplyFiltersToParams(params);\n\n\t\tconst url = '/api/events?' + params.toString();\n\t\tfetchEvents(url, true);\n\t}\n\n\tfunction loadMoreEvents() {\n\t\tif (state.loading || !state.cursor) {\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconst params = new URLSearchParams();\n\t\tparams.set('limit', CONFIG.initialLoadLimit);\n\t\tif (state.cursor) {\n\t\t\tparams.set('before', state.cursor);\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tapplyFiltersToParams(params);\n\n\t\tconst url = '/api/events?' + params.toString();\n\t\tfetchEvents(url, false);\n\t}\n\n\tfunction fetchEvents(url, isInitial) {\n\t\tstate.loading = true;\n\t\tupdateLoadingState();\n\n\t\tfetch(url)\n\t\t\t.then(function(res) {\n\t\t\t\tif (!res.ok) {\n\t\t\t\t\tthrow new Error('Failed to fetch events: ' + res.statusText);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\treturn res.json();\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t.then(function(data) {\n\t\t\t\tif (isInitial) {\n\t\t\t\t\tstate.allLoadedEvents = [];\n\t\t\t\t\tstate.filteredEvents = [];\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// Append to all loaded events\n\t\t\t\tstate.allLoadedEvents = state.allLoadedEvents.concat(data.events || []);\n\t\t\t\tstate.cursor = data.cursor || null;\n\t\t\t\tstate.total = data.total_filtered || 0;\n\n\t\t\t\t// Update filter options with new data\n\t\t\t\tupdateFilterOptions(data.events);\n\n\t\t\t\t// Apply client-side filters\n\t\t\t\tapplyClientSideFilters();\n\n\t\t\t\tupdateLoadMoreButton();\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t.catch(function(err) {\n\t\t\t\tconsole.error('[Timeline] Failed to load events:', err);\n\t\t\t\tstate.error = err.message;\n\t\t\t\tshowError(err.message);\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t.finally(function() {\n\t\t\t\tstate.loading = false;\n\t\t\t\tupdateLoadingState();\n\t\t\t});\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// Filter Handling\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction onFilterChange() {\n\t\t// Update filter state\n\t\tif (elements.filterType) {\n\t\t\tconst value = elements.filterType.value;\n\t\t\tif (value) {\n\t\t\t\t// If a specific type is selected, clear category filters\n\t\t\t\tstate.filters.type = value;\n\t\t\t\t// Disable category checkboxes when specific type selected\n\t\t\t\tdisableCategoryCheckboxes(true);\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tstate.filters.type = null;\n\t\t\t\tdisableCategoryCheckboxes(false);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (elements.filterZone) {\n\t\t\tstate.filters.zone = elements.filterZone.value || null;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (elements.filterPerson) {\n\t\t\tstate.filters.person = elements.filterPerson.value || null;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Reload events with new server-side filters\n\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n\t}\n\n\tfunction onTimeFilterChange() {\n\t\tif (!elements.filterTime) return;\n\n\t\tconst value = elements.filterTime.value;\n\n\t\t// Hide/show custom date container\n\t\tif (elements.customDateContainer) {\n\t\t\tif (value === 'custom') {\n\t\t\t\telements.customDateContainer.style.display = 'flex';\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\telements.customDateContainer.style.display = 'none';\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif (value === 'today') {\n\t\t\tconst today = new Date();\n\t\t\ttoday.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);\n\t\t\tstate.filters.after = today.toISOString();\n\t\t\tstate.filters.until = null;\n\t\t} else if (value === '7d') {\n\t\t\tconst weekAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);\n\t\t\tstate.filters.after = weekAgo.toISOString();\n\t\t\tstate.filters.until = null;\n\t\t} else if (value === '30d') {\n\t\t\tconst monthAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);\n\t\t\tstate.filters.after = monthAgo.toISOString();\n\t\t\tstate.filters.until = null;\n\t\t} else if (value === 'custom') {\n\t\t\t// Wait for user to apply custom range\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tstate.filters.after = null;\n\t\t\tstate.filters.until = null;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Reload events with new date range\n\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n\t}\n\n\tfunction applyCustomDateRange() {\n\t\tif (!elements.dateFrom || !elements.dateTo) return;\n\n\t\tconst fromDate = new Date(elements.dateFrom.value);\n\t\tconst toDate = new Date(elements.dateTo.value);\n\n\t\tif (isNaN(fromDate.getTime()) || isNaN(toDate.getTime())) {\n\t\t\tif (window.SpaxelApp && SpaxelApp.showToast) {\n\t\t\t\tSpaxelApp.showToast('Invalid date range', 'warning');\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Set to start of from day and end of to day\n\t\tfromDate.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);\n\t\ttoDate.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);\n\n\t\tstate.filters.after = fromDate.toISOString();\n\t\tstate.filters.until = toDate.toISOString();\n\n\t\t// Reload events with custom date range\n\t\tloadInitialEvents();\n\t}\n\n\tfunction onSearchChange() {\n\t\tif (elements.filterSearch) {\n\t\t\tstate.filters.q = elements.filterSearch.value.trim() || null;\n\t\t\tapplyClientSideFilters();\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Fuzzy match: checks if all characters in query appear in text in order.\n\t// \"ktchn\" matches \"kitchen\", \"alce\" matches \"alice\", etc.\n\t// Returns a score (lower = better match) or -1 if no match.\n\tfunction fuzzyMatch(query, text) {\n\t\tif (!query || !text) return -1;\n\t\tquery = query.toLowerCase();\n\t\ttext = text.toLowerCase();\n\n\t\t// Fast path: exact substring match\n\t\tvar idx = text.indexOf(query);\n\t\tif (idx !== -1) return idx;\n\n\t\t// Character-sequence matching\n\t\tvar qi = 0;\n\t\tvar score = 0;\n\t\tvar lastMatchIdx = -1;\n\n\t\tfor (var ti = 0; ti < text.length && qi < query.length; ti++) {\n\t\t\tif (text[ti] === query[qi]) {\n\t\t\t\tscore += (lastMatchIdx === ti - 1) ? 0 : 1;\n\t\t\t\tlastMatchIdx = ti;\n\t\t\t\tqi++;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn qi === query.length ? score : -1;\n\t}\n\n\t// Multi-word fuzzy match: splits query into tokens, all must match.\n\t// \"alice kit\" matches \"Alice entered Kitchen\" (both tokens match).\n\tfunction fuzzyMatchAll(query, text) {\n\t\tif (!query || !text) return false;\n\t\tvar tokens = query.toLowerCase().split(/\\s+/).filter(function(t) { return t.length > 0; });\n\t\tif (tokens.length === 0) return true;\n\t\tvar textLower = text.toLowerCase();\n\t\treturn tokens.every(function(token) {\n\t\t\treturn fuzzyMatch(token, textLower) >= 0;\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\n\tfunction disableCategoryCheckboxes(disabled) {\n\t\tconst checkboxes = [\n\t\t\telements.categoryPresence,\n\t\t\telements.categoryZones,\n\t\t\telements.categoryAlerts,\n\t\t\telements.categorySystem,\n\t\t\telements.categoryLearning\n\t\t];\n\t\tcheckboxes.forEach(function(cb) {\n\t\t\tif (cb) {\n\t\t\t\tcb.disabled = disabled;\n\t\t\t\tif (disabled) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcb.parentElement.style.opacity = '0.5';\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tcb.parentElement.style.opacity = '1';\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// Client-Side Filtering\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction applyClientSideFilters() {\n\t\t// Start with all loaded events\n\t\tlet filtered = state.allLoadedEvents.slice();\n\n\t\t// Apply category filters\n\t\tif (!state.filters.type) {\n\t\t\tconst enabledCategories = Object.keys(state.filters.categories).filter(\n\t\t\t\tfunction(cat) { return state.filters.categories[cat]; }\n\t\t\t);\n\n\t\t\tconst allowedTypes = new Set();\n\t\t\tenabledCategories.forEach(function(cat) {\n\t\t\t\tconst types = EVENT_CATEGORIES[cat];\n\t\t\t\tif (types) {\n\t\t\t\t\ttypes.forEach(function(t) { allowedTypes.add(t); });\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t});\n\n\t\t\tif (allowedTypes.size > 0) {\n\t\t\t\tfiltered = filtered.filter(function(event) {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn allowedTypes.has(event.type);\n\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// Specific type filter\n\t\t\tfiltered = filtered.filter(function(event) {\n\t\t\t\treturn event.type === state.filters.type;\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Apply zone filter\n\t\tif (state.filters.zone) {\n\t\t\tfiltered = filtered.filter(function(event) {\n\t\t\t\treturn event.zone === state.filters.zone;\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Apply person filter\n\t\tif (state.filters.person) {\n\t\t\tfiltered = filtered.filter(function(event) {\n\t\t\t\treturn event.person === state.filters.person;\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Apply text search with fuzzy matching\n\t\tif (state.filters.q) {\n\t\t\tconst query = state.filters.q;\n\t\t\tfiltered = filtered.filter(function(event) {\n\t\t\t\tvar searchParts = [event.type || '', event.zone || '', event.person || ''];\n\t\t\t\tif (event.detail_json) {\n\t\t\t\t\ttry {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tvar detail = JSON.parse(event.detail_json);\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (detail.description) searchParts.push(detail.description);\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (detail.message) searchParts.push(detail.message);\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsearchParts.push(JSON.stringify(detail));\n\t\t\t\t\t} catch (e) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsearchParts.push(event.detail_json);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tvar combinedText = searchParts.join(' ');\n\t\t\t\treturn fuzzyMatchAll(query, combinedText);\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Sort by timestamp descending\n\t\tfiltered.sort(function(a, b) {\n\t\t\treturn b.timestamp_ms - a.timestamp_ms;\n\t\t});\n\n\t\tstate.filteredEvents = filtered;\n\t\trenderEvents();\n\t}\n\n\tfunction applyFiltersToParams(params) {\n\t\t// Server-side filters\n\t\tif (state.filters.type) {\n\t\t\tparams.set('type', state.filters.type);\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// Send category-based types filter to server for efficient initial loading\n\t\t\tvar enabledTypes = getEnabledCategoryTypes();\n\t\t\tvar allTypes = getAllCategoryTypes();\n\t\t\tif (enabledTypes.length > 0 && enabledTypes.length < allTypes.length) {\n\t\t\t\tparams.set('types', enabledTypes.join(','));\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (state.filters.zone) {\n\t\t\tparams.set('zone', state.filters.zone);\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (state.filters.person) {\n\t\t\tparams.set('person', state.filters.person);\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (state.filters.after) {\n\t\t\tparams.set('since', state.filters.after);\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (state.filters.until) {\n\t\t\tparams.set('until', state.filters.until);\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (state.filters.q) {\n\t\t\tparams.set('q', state.filters.q);\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Add mode parameter based on dashboard mode\n\t\tparams.set('mode', state.dashboardMode);\n\t}\n\n\tfunction getEnabledCategoryTypes() {\n\t\tvar types = [];\n\t\tObject.keys(state.filters.categories).forEach(function(cat) {\n\t\t\tif (state.filters.categories[cat]) {\n\t\t\t\tvar catTypes = EVENT_CATEGORIES[cat];\n\t\t\t\tif (catTypes) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcatTypes.forEach(function(t) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (types.indexOf(t) === -1) types.push(t);\n\t\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t});\n\t\treturn types;\n\t}\n\n\tfunction getAllCategoryTypes() {\n\t\tvar types = [];\n\t\tObject.keys(EVENT_CATEGORIES).forEach(function(cat) {\n\t\t\tEVENT_CATEGORIES[cat].forEach(function(t) {\n\t\t\t\tif (types.indexOf(t) === -1) types.push(t);\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t});\n\t\treturn types;\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// WebSocket Message Handler\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction handleWebSocketMessage(msg) {\n\t\tif (msg.type === 'event') {\n\t\t\thandleNewEvent(msg.event);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tfunction handleNewEvent(event) {\n\t\tconsole.log('[Timeline] New event:', event);\n\n\t\t// Normalize event format (live events use ts/kind/person_name, DB events use timestamp_ms/type/person)\n\t\tconst normalizedEvent = {\n\t\t\tid: event.id || event.timestamp_ms || Date.now(),\n\t\t\ttimestamp_ms: event.timestamp_ms || event.ts || Date.now(),\n\t\t\ttype: event.type || event.kind || 'system',\n\t\t\tzone: event.zone || '',\n\t\t\tperson: event.person || event.person_name || '',\n\t\t\tblob_id: event.blob_id || event.blobID || 0,\n\t\t\tdetail_json: event.detail_json || '',\n\t\t\tseverity: event.severity || 'info'\n\t\t};\n\n\t\t// Add to beginning of all loaded events\n\t\tstate.allLoadedEvents.unshift(normalizedEvent);\n\t\tstate.total++;\n\n\t\t// Update filter options\n\t\tif (normalizedEvent.type) {\n\t\t\tstate.availableTypes.add(normalizedEvent.type);\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (normalizedEvent.zone) {\n\t\t\tstate.availableZones.add(normalizedEvent.zone);\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (normalizedEvent.person) {\n\t\t\tstate.availablePersons.add(normalizedEvent.person);\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Apply client-side filters to update displayed events\n\t\tapplyClientSideFilters();\n\n\t\t// Prepend to DOM if timeline is visible and event passes filters\n\t\tif (elements.container && elements.container.style.display !== 'none' && elements.eventsList) {\n\t\t\t// Check if event passes current filters\n\t\t\tconst passesFilters = state.filteredEvents.some(function(e) { return e.id === normalizedEvent.id; });\n\n\t\t\tif (!passesFilters) return; // Don't show if filtered out\n\n\t\t\telements.empty.style.display = 'none';\n\n\t\t\tconst tempDiv = document.createElement('div');\n\t\t\ttempDiv.innerHTML = renderEvent(normalizedEvent, true, 0);\n\t\t\tconst newEventEl = tempDiv.firstElementChild;\n\n\t\t\telements.eventsList.insertBefore(newEventEl, elements.eventsList.firstChild);\n\n\t\t\t// Bind handlers for the new event\n\t\t\tbindEventHandlersForElement(newEventEl);\n\n\t\t\t// Remove animation class after it completes\n\t\t\tsetTimeout(function() {\n\t\t\t\tnewEventEl.classList.remove('new-event');\n\t\t\t}, 300);\n\n\t\t\t// Limit DOM elements (keep only most recent 100 in DOM)\n\t\t\twhile (elements.eventsList.children.length > 100) {\n\t\t\t\tconst lastChild = elements.eventsList.lastElementChild;\n\t\t\t\tif (lastChild && !lastChild.classList.contains('timeline-spacer')) {\n\t\t\t\t\telements.eventsList.removeChild(lastChild);\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tupdateFilterOptions();\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Bind handlers for a single event element\n\tfunction bindEventHandlersForElement(eventEl) {\n\t\t// Feedback buttons\n\t\teventEl.querySelectorAll('.timeline-feedback-btn').forEach(function(btn) {\n\t\t\tbtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n\t\t\t\te.stopPropagation();\n\t\t\t\tconst action = btn.dataset.action;\n\t\t\t\tconst eventId = eventEl.dataset.id;\n\t\t\t\thandleFeedback(eventId, action, eventEl);\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t});\n\n\t\t// Explainability button\n\t\teventEl.querySelectorAll('.timeline-explain-btn').forEach(function(btn) {\n\t\t\tbtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n\t\t\t\te.stopPropagation();\n\t\t\t\tconst blobId = btn.dataset.blobId;\n\t\t\t\thandleExplainability(blobId, eventEl);\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t});\n\n\t\t// Seek button\n\t\teventEl.querySelectorAll('.timeline-seek-btn').forEach(function(btn) {\n\t\t\tbtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n\t\t\t\te.stopPropagation();\n\t\t\t\tconst timestamp = parseInt(eventEl.dataset.timestamp, 10);\n\t\t\t\thandleSeek(timestamp, eventEl);\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t});\n\n\t\t// Entry click (also seeks)\n\t\teventEl.addEventListener('click', function() {\n\t\t\tconst timestamp = parseInt(this.dataset.timestamp, 10);\n\t\t\thandleSeek(timestamp, this);\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// Rendering\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction renderEvents() {\n\t\tif (!elements.eventsList) return;\n\n\t\tif (state.filteredEvents.length === 0) {\n\t\t\telements.eventsList.innerHTML = '';\n\t\t\tif (elements.empty) {\n\t\t\t\telements.empty.style.display = 'block';\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (elements.error) {\n\t\t\t\telements.error.style.display = 'none';\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\telements.empty.style.display = 'none';\n\t\tif (elements.error) {\n\t\t\telements.error.style.display = 'none';\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Use virtualized rendering if enabled\n\t\tif (CONFIG.virtualization.enabled && state.filteredEvents.length > CONFIG.maxDOMItems) {\n\t\t\trenderVirtualizedEvents();\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\trenderAllEvents();\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// Render All Events (for small datasets)\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction renderAllEvents() {\n\t\t// Build HTML for events\n\t\tlet html = '';\n\t\tstate.filteredEvents.forEach(function(event, index) {\n\t\t\thtml += renderEvent(event, false, index);\n\t\t});\n\n\t\telements.eventsList.innerHTML = html;\n\n\t\t// Bind click handlers\n\t\tbindEventHandlers();\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// Render Virtualized Events (for large datasets)\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction renderVirtualizedEvents() {\n\t\t// Clear existing content\n\t\telements.eventsList.innerHTML = '';\n\n\t\t// Calculate initial visible range\n\t\tconst containerHeight = elements.eventsList.clientHeight || 400;\n\t\tconst visibleCount = Math.ceil(containerHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n\t\tconst bufferCount = CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize;\n\n\t\tstate.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = 0;\n\t\tstate.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.filteredEvents.length - 1, visibleCount + bufferCount * 2);\n\n\t\t// Create spacers\n\t\tupdateVirtualSpacers();\n\n\t\t// Render initial batch\n\t\tupdateRenderedRange();\n\t}\n\n\tfunction renderEvent(event, isNew, index) {\n\t\tconst info = eventTypeInfo[event.type] || eventTypeInfo.system;\n\t\tconst timeStr = formatTimestamp(event.timestamp_ms);\n\t\tconst personStr = event.person ? escapeHtml(event.person) : '';\n\t\tconst zoneStr = event.zone ? escapeHtml(event.zone) : '';\n\t\tconst description = buildEventDescription(event);\n\n\t\t// Severity indicator for alerts\n\t\tconst severityClass = event.severity === 'alert' || event.severity === 'critical' ? ' severity-critical' : '';\n\t\tconst newClass = isNew ? ' new-event' : '';\n\n\t\t// Determine if this is a system event (for secondary styling)\n\t\t// System events: node_online, node_offline, ota_update, baseline_changed, system, learning_milestone, anomaly_learned\n\t\tconst systemEventTypes = ['node_online', 'node_offline', 'ota_update', 'baseline_changed', 'system', 'learning_milestone', 'anomaly_learned'];\n\t\tconst isSystemEvent = systemEventTypes.indexOf(event.type) !== -1;\n\t\tconst secondaryClass = isSystemEvent ? ' secondary' : '';\n\n\t\t// Check if this event has a blob_id for explainability\n\t\tconst hasBlobId = event.blob_id !== undefined && event.blob_id !== null && event.blob_id !== 0;\n\t\tconst explainabilityBtn = hasBlobId ? `\n\t\t\t<button class=\"timeline-explain-btn\" data-blob-id=\"${event.blob_id}\" title=\"Why is this here?\">\n\t\t\t\t<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\">\n\t\t\t\t\t<circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"10\"></circle>\n\t\t\t\t\t<path d=\"M9.09 9a3 3 0 0 1 5.83 1c0 2-3 3-3 3\"></path>\n\t\t\t\t\t<line x1=\"12\" y1=\"17\" x2=\"12.01\" y2=\"17\"></line>\n\t\t\t\t</svg>\n\t\t\t</button>\n\t\t` : '';\n\n\t\tconst dataIndex = index !== undefined ? ` data-index=\"${index}\"` : '';\n\n\t\treturn `\n\t\t\t<div class=\"timeline-event timeline-${event.type}${severityClass}${newClass}${secondaryClass}\" data-type=\"${event.type}\" data-id=\"${event.id}\" data-timestamp=\"${event.timestamp_ms}\" data-blob-id=\"${event.blob_id || ''}\"${dataIndex}>\n\t\t\t\t<div class=\"timeline-event-icon\">${info.icon}</div>\n\t\t\t\t<div class=\"timeline-event-content\">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class=\"timeline-event-header\">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class=\"timeline-event-title\">${description}</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class=\"timeline-event-meta\">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class=\"timeline-event-time\">${timeStr}</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t${zoneStr ? `<span class=\"timeline-event-zone\">${zoneStr}</span>` : ''}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t${personStr ? `<span class=\"timeline-event-person\">${personStr}</span>` : ''}\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t<div class=\"timeline-event-actions\">\n\t\t\t\t\t<button class=\"timeline-feedback-btn positive\" data-action=\"correct\" title=\"Correct\">👍</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t<button class=\"timeline-feedback-btn negative\" data-action=\"incorrect\" title=\"Incorrect\">👎</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t${explainabilityBtn}\n\t\t\t\t\t<button class=\"timeline-seek-btn\" title=\"Jump to this moment\">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<polygon points=\"5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3\"></polygon>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</svg>\n\t\t\t\t\t</button>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t`;\n\t}\n\n\tfunction buildEventDescription(event) {\n\t\tconst info = eventTypeInfo[event.type] || eventTypeInfo.system;\n\t\tconst base = info.description;\n\n\t\t// Parse detail_json for additional context\n\t\tlet detail = '';\n\t\tif (event.detail_json) {\n\t\t\ttry {\n\t\t\t\tconst detailObj = JSON.parse(event.detail_json);\n\t\t\t\tif (detailObj.description) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdetail = detailObj.description;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} catch (e) {\n\t\t\t\t// Ignore parse errors\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn detail || base;\n\t}\n\n\tfunction formatTimestamp(ms) {\n\t\tconst date = new Date(ms);\n\t\tconst now = new Date();\n\t\tconst isToday = date.toDateString() === now.toDateString();\n\t\tconst isYesterday = new Date(now);\n\t\tisYesterday.setDate(now.getDate() - 1);\n\t\tconst isYesterdayDate = date.toDateString() === isYesterday.toDateString();\n\n\t\tconst time = date.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });\n\n\t\tif (isToday) {\n\t\t\treturn time + ' today';\n\t\t} else if (isYesterdayDate) {\n\t\t\treturn time + ' yesterday';\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\treturn date.toLocaleDateString() + ' ' + time;\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tfunction escapeHtml(str) {\n\t\tif (!str) return '';\n\t\treturn String(str)\n\t\t\t.replace(/&/g, '&amp;')\n\t\t\t.replace(/</g, '&lt;')\n\t\t\t.replace(/>/g, '&gt;')\n\t\t\t.replace(/\"/g, '&quot;');\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// Event Handlers\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction bindEventHandlers() {\n\t\t// Feedback buttons\n\t\telements.eventsList.querySelectorAll('.timeline-feedback-btn').forEach(function(btn) {\n\t\t\tbtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n\t\t\t\te.stopPropagation();\n\t\t\t\tconst action = btn.dataset.action;\n\t\t\t\tconst entry = btn.closest('.timeline-event');\n\t\t\t\tconst eventId = entry.dataset.id;\n\t\t\t\thandleFeedback(eventId, action, entry);\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t});\n\n\t\t// Explainability buttons\n\t\telements.eventsList.querySelectorAll('.timeline-explain-btn').forEach(function(btn) {\n\t\t\tbtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n\t\t\t\te.stopPropagation();\n\t\t\t\tconst blobId = btn.dataset.blobId;\n\t\t\t\tconst entry = btn.closest('.timeline-event');\n\t\t\t\thandleExplainability(blobId, entry);\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t});\n\n\t\t// Seek button\n\t\telements.eventsList.querySelectorAll('.timeline-seek-btn').forEach(function(btn) {\n\t\t\tbtn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n\t\t\t\te.stopPropagation();\n\t\t\t\tconst entry = btn.closest('.timeline-event');\n\t\t\t\tconst timestamp = parseInt(entry.dataset.timestamp, 10);\n\t\t\t\thandleSeek(timestamp, entry);\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t});\n\n\t\t// Entry click (also seeks)\n\t\telements.eventsList.querySelectorAll('.timeline-event').forEach(function(entry) {\n\t\t\tentry.addEventListener('click', function() {\n\t\t\t\tconst timestamp = parseInt(this.dataset.timestamp, 10);\n\t\t\t\thandleSeek(timestamp, this);\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// Explainability Handler\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction handleExplainability(blobId, entryElement) {\n\t\tconsole.log('[Timeline] Explainability requested for blob:', blobId);\n\n\t\t// Open explainability overlay\n\t\tif (window.Explainability) {\n\t\t\twindow.Explainability.explain(blobId);\n\t\t} else if (window.Viz3D && window.Viz3D.explainBlob) {\n\t\t\t// Fallback to Viz3D's explainBlob if Explainability module not loaded\n\t\t\twindow.Viz3D.explainBlob(blobId);\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tconsole.error('[Timeline] Explainability module not available');\n\t\t\tif (window.SpaxelApp && SpaxelApp.showToast) {\n\t\t\t\tSpaxelApp.showToast('Explainability not available', 'warning');\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// ============================================\n\t// Feedback Handler\n\t// ============================================\n\tfunction handleFeedback(eventId, action, entryElement) {\n\t\tconst correct = action === 'correct';\n\n\t\t// POST /api/feedback\n\t\tconst payload = {\n\t\t\ttype: correct ? 'correct' : 'incorrect',\n\t\t\tevent_id: parseInt(eventId, 10)\n\t\t};\n\n\t\tfetch('/api/feedback', {\n\t\t\tmethod: 'POST',\n\t\t\theaders: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n\t\t\tbody: JSON.stringify(payload)\n\t\t})\n\t\t\t.then(function(res) {\n\t\t\t\tif (res.ok) {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn res.json();\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tthrow new Error('Failed to submit feedback');\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t.then(function(data) {\n\t\t\t\t// Show visual feedback\n\t\t\t\tconst feedbackBtns = entryElement.querySelectorAll('.timeline-feedback-btn');\n\t\t\t\tfeedbackBtns.forEach(function(btn) {\n\t\t\t\t\tif (btn.dataset.action === action) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbtn.classList.add('active');\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsetTimeout(function() {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tbtn.classList.remove('active');\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}, 2000);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t});\n\n\t\t\t\t// Show toast notification\n\t\t\t\tif (window.SpaxelApp && SpaxelApp.showToast) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst message = correct ? res.json() : null; })\n366\t            .then(function(data) {\n367\t                if (!data || !elements.zoneSelect) return;\n368\t                var zones = Array.isArray(data) ? data : (data.zones || []);\n369\t                zones.forEach(function(z) {\n370\t                    var name = z.name || '';\n371\t                    if (!name) return;\n372\t                    var opt = document.createElement('option');\n373\t                    opt.value = name;\n374\t                    opt.textContent = name;\n375\t                    elements.zoneSelect.appendChild(opt);\n376\t                });\n377\t            })\n378\t            .catch(function() {\n379\t                // Zones endpoint may not be available yet — silently skip\n380\t            });\n381\t    }\n382\t\n383\t    // ============================================\n384\t    // Mode Change Handlers\n385\t    // ============================================\n386\t    function onRouterModeChange() {\n387\t        if (state.panelVisible) {\n388\t            resetAndReload();\n389\t        }\n390\t    }\n391\t\n392\t    // ============================================\n393\t    // Panel Visibility\n394\t    // ============================================\n395\t    function showPanel() {\n396\t        if (elements.panel) {\n397\t            elements.panel.classList.remove('collapsed');\n398\t            state.panelVisible = true;\n399\t        }\n400\t        if (elements.showBtn) {\n401\t            elements.showBtn.classList.add('hidden');\n402\t        }\n403\t    }\n404\t\n405\t    function hidePanel() {\n406\t        if (elements.panel) {\n407\t            elements.panel.classList.add('collapsed');\n408\t            state.panelVisible = false;\n409\t        }\n410\t        if (elements.showBtn) {\n411\t            elements.showBtn.classList.remove('hidden');\n412\t        }\n413\t    }\n414\t\n415\t    function togglePanel() {\n416\t        if (state.panelVisible) {\n417\t            hidePanel();\n418\t        } else {\n419\t            showPanel();\n420\t        }\n421\t    }\n422\t\n423\t    // ============================================\n424\t    // Filter Controls Visibility\n425\t    // ============================================\n426\t    function toggleFilterControls() {\n427\t        state.filterControlsVisible = !state.filterControlsVisible;\n428\t        if (elements.filterControls) {\n429\t            if (state.filterControlsVisible) {\n430\t                elements.filterControls.classList.remove('collapsed');\n431\t            } else {\n432\t                elements.filterControls.classList.add('collapsed');\n433\t            }\n434\t        }\n435\t        if (elements.filterToggleBtn) {\n436\t            elements.filterToggleBtn.classList.toggle('active', state.filterControlsVisible);\n437\t        }\n438\t    }\n439\t\n440\t    // ============================================\n441\t    // Date Range Handling (server-side)\n442\t    // ============================================\n443\t    function handleDateRangeChange(value) {\n444\t        state.filters.dateRange = value;\n445\t\n446\t        if (elements.customDateContainer) {\n447\t            elements.customDateContainer.style.display = value === 'custom' ? 'flex' : 'none';\n448\t        }\n449\t\n450\t        if (value === 'custom') {\n451\t            // Wait for the Apply button\n452\t            return;\n453\t        }\n454\t\n455\t        var now = new Date();\n456\t        state.serverSince = '';\n457\t        state.serverUntil = '';\n458\t\n459\t        switch (value) {\n460\t            case 'today': {\n461\t                var start = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), now.getDate());\n462\t                state.serverSince = start.toISOString();\n463\t                break;\n464\t            }\n465\t            case '7days':\n466\t                state.serverSince = new Date(now.getTime() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();\n467\t                break;\n468\t            case '30days':\n469\t                state.serverSince = new Date(now.getTime() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();\n470\t                break;\n471\t            default:\n472\t                // 'all' — no bounds\n473\t                break;\n474\t        }\n475\t\n476\t        updateActiveFilters();\n477\t        resetAndReload();\n478\t    }\n479\t\n480\t    function applyCustomDateRange() {\n481\t        var fromVal = elements.dateFrom ? elements.dateFrom.value : '';\n482\t        var toVal = elements.dateTo ? elements.dateTo.value : '';\n483\t\n484\t        state.filters.customFrom = fromVal;\n485\t        state.filters.customTo = toVal;\n486\t\n487\t        // Convert date strings (YYYY-MM-DD) to ISO8601\n488\t        if (fromVal) {\n489\t            state.serverSince = new Date(fromVal).toISOString();\n490\t        } else {\n491\t            state.serverSince = '';\n492\t        }\n493\t        if (toVal) {\n494\t            // Include the full day by setting to end-of-day\n495\t            var endOfDay = new Date(toVal);\n496\t            endOfDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);\n497\t            state.serverUntil = endOfDay.toISOString();\n498\t        } else {\n499\t            state.serverUntil = '';\n500\t        }\n501\t\n502\t        updateActiveFilters();\n503\t        resetAndReload();\n504\t    }\n505\t\n506\t    // ============================================\n507\t    // Event Loading\n508\t    // ============================================\n509\t\n510\t    function buildServerParams(cursor) {\n511\t        var params = new URLSearchParams();\n512\t        params.set('limit', CONFIG.initialLoadLimit);\n513\t\n514\t        if (state.serverSince) params.set('since', state.serverSince);\n515\t        if (state.serverUntil) params.set('until', state.serverUntil);\n516\t\n517\t        // Pass the search query to FTS5 when doing a fresh fetch\n518\t        if (state.filters.searchQuery) {\n519\t            params.set('q', state.filters.searchQuery);\n520\t        }\n521\t\n522\t        // Collect enabled category types for server-side filtering\n523\t        var enabledTypes = [];\n524\t        Object.keys(state.filters.categories).forEach(function(cat) {\n525\t            if (state.filters.categories[cat] && CATEGORY_TYPES[cat]) {\n526\t                enabledTypes = enabledTypes.concat(CATEGORY_TYPES[cat]);\n527\t            }\n528\t        });\n529\t        if (enabledTypes.length > 0) {\n530\t            params.set('types', enabledTypes.join(','));\n531\t        }\n532\t\n533\t        if (cursor) params.set('before', cursor);\n534\t\n535\t        return params;\n536\t    }\n537\t\n538\t    function resetAndReload() {\n539\t        state.allLoadedEvents = [];\n540\t        state.events = [];\n541\t        state.cursor = null;\n542\t        state.hasMore = false;\n543\t\n544\t        if (elements.eventsContainer) elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n545\t        renderLoadMore();\n546\t        updateCountDisplay();\n547\t        loadInitialEvents();\n548\t    }\n549\t\n550\t    function loadInitialEvents() {\n551\t        if (state.loading) return;\n552\t        state.loading = true;\n553\t        updateLoadingState();\n554\t\n555\t        var params = buildServerParams(null);\n556\t\n557\t        fetch('/api/events?' + params.toString())\n558\t            .then(function(res) {\n559\t                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch events: ' + res.statusText);\n560\t                return res.json();\n561\t            })\n562\t            .then(function(data) {\n563\t                state.allLoadedEvents = data.events || [];\n564\t                state.cursor = data.cursor || null;\n565\t                state.hasMore = data.has_more || false;\n566\t                state.total = data.total_filtered || 0;\n567\t                applyClientFilters();\n568\t                renderLoadMore();\n569\t                updateCountDisplay();\n570\t            })\n571\t            .catch(function(err) {\n572\t                console.error('[SidebarTimeline] Failed to load events:', err);\n573\t            })\n574\t            .finally(function() {\n575\t                state.loading = false;\n576\t                updateLoadingState();\n577\t            });\n578\t    }\n579\t\n580\t    function loadMoreEvents() {\n581\t        if (state.loading || !state.hasMore || !state.cursor) return;\n582\t        state.loading = true;\n583\t        updateLoadingState();\n584\t\n585\t        if (elements.loadMoreBtn) {\n586\t            elements.loadMoreBtn.disabled = true;\n587\t            elements.loadMoreBtn.textContent = 'Loading...';\n588\t        }\n589\t\n590\t        var params = buildServerParams(state.cursor);\n591\t\n592\t        fetch('/api/events?' + params.toString())\n593\t            .then(function(res) {\n594\t                if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch events: ' + res.statusText);\n595\t                return res.json();\n596\t            })\n597\t            .then(function(data) {\n598\t                var newEvents = data.events || [];\n599\t                state.allLoadedEvents = state.allLoadedEvents.concat(newEvents);\n600\t\n601\t                // Trim to memory limit\n602\t                if (state.allLoadedEvents.length > CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory) {\n603\t                    state.allLoadedEvents = state.allLoadedEvents.slice(0, CONFIG.maxEventsInMemory);\n604\t                }\n605\t\n606\t                state.cursor = data.cursor || null;\n607\t                state.hasMore = data.has_more || false;\n608\t                state.total = data.total_filtered || 0;\n609\t\n610\t                applyClientFilters();\n611\t                renderLoadMore();\n612\t                updateCountDisplay();\n613\t            })\n614\t            .catch(function(err) {\n615\t                console.error('[SidebarTimeline] Failed to load more events:', err);\n616\t            })\n617\t            .finally(function() {\n618\t                state.loading = false;\n619\t                updateLoadingState();\n620\t                if (elements.loadMoreBtn) {\n621\t                    elements.loadMoreBtn.disabled = false;\n622\t                    elements.loadMoreBtn.textContent = 'Load more';\n623\t                }\n624\t            });\n625\t    }\n626\t\n627\t    // ============================================\n628\t    // Client-Side Filtering\n629\t    // ============================================\n630\t\n631\t    function eventMatchesFilters(event) {\n632\t        var typeInfo = EVENT_TYPES[event.type] || EVENT_TYPES.system;\n633\t        var category = typeInfo.category || 'system';\n634\t\n635\t        // Category filter\n636\t        if (!state.filters.categories[category]) return false;\n637\t\n638\t        // Person filter\n639\t        if (state.filters.person && event.person !== state.filters.person) return false;\n640\t\n641\t        // Zone filter\n642\t        if (state.filters.zone && event.zone !== state.filters.zone) return false;\n643\t\n644\t        // Text search — fuzzy match on computed description\n645\t        if (state.filters.searchQuery) {\n646\t            var desc = buildEventDescription(event, typeInfo).toLowerCase();\n647\t            var query = state.filters.searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n648\t            if (!fuzzyMatch(desc, query)) return false;\n649\t        }\n650\t\n651\t        return true;\n652\t    }\n653\t\n654\t    /**\n655\t     * Simple fuzzy match: returns true if all characters in query appear\n656\t     * in order within text, or text contains query as a substring.\n657\t     * Uses substring match for short queries (< 4 chars) and sequential\n658\t     * character matching for longer queries.\n659\t     */\n660\t    function fuzzyMatch(text, query) {\n661\t        if (!query) return true;\n662\t        if (text.indexOf(query) !== -1) return true;\n663\t        if (query.length < 4) return false;\n664\t\n665\t        // Sequential character fuzzy match\n666\t        var qi = 0;\n667\t        for (var ti = 0; ti < text.length && qi < query.length; ti++) {\n668\t            if (text[ti] === query[qi]) qi++;\n669\t        }\n670\t        return qi === query.length;\n671\t    }\n672\t\n673\t    function applyClientFilters() {\n674\t        state.events = state.allLoadedEvents.filter(eventMatchesFilters);\n675\t        renderEvents();\n676\t    }\n677\t\n678\t    // ============================================\n679\t    // Active Filters Display\n680\t    // ============================================\n681\t    function updateActiveFilters() {\n682\t        if (!elements.activeFilters || !elements.activeFilterTags) return;\n683\t\n684\t        var tags = [];\n685\t\n686\t        // Disabled categories\n687\t        var allCats = ['presence', 'zones', 'alerts', 'system', 'learning'];\n688\t        var catLabels = { presence: 'Presence', zones: 'Zones', alerts: 'Alerts', system: 'System', learning: 'Learning' };\n689\t        allCats.forEach(function(cat) {\n690\t            if (!state.filters.categories[cat]) {\n691\t                tags.push({ label: catLabels[cat] + ' hidden', key: 'cat:' + cat });\n692\t            }\n693\t        });\n694\t\n695\t        // Person\n696\t        if (state.filters.person) {\n697\t            tags.push({ label: 'Person: ' + state.filters.person, key: 'person' });\n698\t        }\n699\t\n700\t        // Zone\n701\t        if (state.filters.zone) {\n702\t            tags.push({ label: 'Zone: ' + state.filters.zone, key: 'zone' });\n703\t        }\n704\t\n705\t        // Date range\n706\t        var dateLabels = { today: 'Today', '7days': 'Last 7 days', '30days': 'Last 30 days', custom: 'Custom range' };\n707\t        if (state.filters.dateRange !== 'all') {\n708\t            var label = dateLabels[state.filters.dateRange] || state.filters.dateRange;\n709\t            if (state.filters.dateRange === 'custom' && state.filters.customFrom) {\n710\t                label = state.filters.customFrom + ' to ' + (state.filters.customTo || 'now');\n711\t            }\n712\t            tags.push({ label: label, key: 'date' });\n713\t        }\n714\t\n715\t        // Search\n716\t        if (state.filters.searchQuery) {\n717\t            tags.push({ label: 'Search: ' + state.filters.searchQuery, key: 'search' });\n718\t        }\n719\t\n720\t        if (tags.length === 0) {\n721\t            elements.activeFilters.style.display = 'none';\n722\t            return;\n723\t        }\n724\t\n725\t        elements.activeFilters.style.display = 'flex';\n726\t        elements.activeFilterTags.innerHTML = tags.map(function(tag) {\n727\t            return '<span class=\"sidebar-filter-tag\" data-key=\"' + escapeHtml(tag.key) + '\">' +\n728\t                escapeHtml(tag.label) +\n729\t                '<button class=\"sidebar-filter-tag-remove\" title=\"Remove filter\">×</button>' +\n730\t                '</span>';\n731\t        }).join('');\n732\t\n733\t        // Bind remove buttons\n734\t        elements.activeFilterTags.querySelectorAll('.sidebar-filter-tag-remove').forEach(function(btn) {\n735\t            btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n736\t                e.stopPropagation();\n737\t                var key = btn.closest('.sidebar-filter-tag').dataset.key;\n738\t                removeFilter(key);\n739\t            });\n740\t        });\n741\t    }\n742\t\n743\t    function removeFilter(key) {\n744\t        if (key === 'person') {\n745\t            state.filters.person = '';\n746\t            if (elements.personSelect) elements.personSelect.value = '';\n747\t            applyClientFilters();\n748\t        } else if (key === 'zone') {\n749\t            state.filters.zone = '';\n750\t            if (elements.zoneSelect) elements.zoneSelect.value = '';\n751\t            applyClientFilters();\n752\t        } else if (key === 'search') {\n753\t            state.filters.searchQuery = '';\n754\t            if (elements.searchInput) elements.searchInput.value = '';\n755\t            applyClientFilters();\n756\t        } else if (key === 'date') {\n757\t            state.filters.dateRange = 'all';\n758\t            state.filters.customFrom = '';\n759\t            state.filters.customTo = '';\n760\t            state.serverSince = '';\n761\t            state.serverUntil = '';\n762\t            if (elements.dateRangeSelect) elements.dateRangeSelect.value = 'all';\n763\t            if (elements.customDateContainer) elements.customDateContainer.style.display = 'none';\n764\t            resetAndReload();\n765\t        } else if (key.indexOf('cat:') === 0) {\n766\t            var cat = key.substring(4);\n767\t            state.filters.categories[cat] = true;\n768\t            var catEl = document.getElementById('filter-category-' + cat);\n769\t            if (catEl) catEl.checked = true;\n770\t            applyClientFilters();\n771\t        }\n772\t        updateActiveFilters();\n773\t    }\n774\t\n775\t    function clearAllFilters() {\n776\t        state.filters.categories = { presence: true, zones: true, alerts: true, system: false, learning: false };\n777\t        state.filters.person = '';\n778\t        state.filters.zone = '';\n779\t        state.filters.dateRange = 'all';\n780\t        state.filters.customFrom = '';\n781\t        state.filters.customTo = '';\n782\t        state.filters.searchQuery = '';\n783\t        state.serverSince = '';\n784\t        state.serverUntil = '';\n785\t\n786\t        // Reset UI\n787\t        if (elements.categoryPresence) elements.categoryPresence.checked = true;\n788\t        if (elements.categoryZones) elements.categoryZones.checked = true;\n789\t        if (elements.categoryAlerts) elements.categoryAlerts.checked = true;\n790\t        if (elements.categorySystem) elements.categorySystem.checked = false;\n791\t        if (elements.categoryLearning) elements.categoryLearning.checked = false;\n792\t        if (elements.personSelect) elements.personSelect.value = '';\n793\t        if (elements.zoneSelect) elements.zoneSelect.value = '';\n794\t        if (elements.dateRangeSelect) elements.dateRangeSelect.value = 'all';\n795\t        if (elements.searchInput) elements.searchInput.value = '';\n796\t        if (elements.customDateContainer) elements.customDateContainer.style.display = 'none';\n797\t\n798\t        updateActiveFilters();\n799\t        resetAndReload();\n800\t    }\n801\t\n802\t    // ============================================\n803\t    // Virtualization Setup\n804\t    // ============================================\n805\t    function setupVirtualization() {\n806\t        if (!CONFIG.virtualization.enabled || !elements.content) return;\n807\t\n808\t        var observerOptions = {\n809\t            root: elements.content,\n810\t            rootMargin: CONFIG.virtualization.rootMargin,\n811\t            threshold: CONFIG.virtualization.threshold\n812\t        };\n813\t\n814\t        state.virtualization.observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {\n815\t            handleIntersection(entries);\n816\t        }, observerOptions);\n817\t    }\n818\t\n819\t    function handleIntersection(entries) {\n820\t        entries.forEach(function(entry) {\n821\t            var index = parseInt(entry.target.dataset.index, 10);\n822\t            if (isNaN(index)) return;\n823\t            if (entry.isIntersecting) {\n824\t                state.virtualization.visibleIndices.add(index);\n825\t            } else {\n826\t                state.virtualization.visibleIndices.delete(index);\n827\t            }\n828\t        });\n829\t        updateRenderedRange();\n830\t    }\n831\t\n832\t    function onScroll() {\n833\t        if (!elements.content) return;\n834\t\n835\t        state.virtualization.scrollTop = elements.content.scrollTop;\n836\t\n837\t        var firstIndex = Math.floor(state.virtualization.scrollTop / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n838\t        var visibleCount = Math.ceil(elements.content.clientHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n839\t        var lastIndex = firstIndex + visibleCount;\n840\t\n841\t        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = Math.max(0, firstIndex - CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n842\t        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, lastIndex + CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize);\n843\t\n844\t        updateRenderedRange();\n845\t    }\n846\t\n847\t    function updateRenderedRange() {\n848\t        if (!state.events.length) return;\n849\t\n850\t        var firstIdx = Math.max(0, state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex);\n851\t        var lastIdx = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex);\n852\t\n853\t        var newRenderedIndices = new Set();\n854\t        for (var i = firstIdx; i <= lastIdx; i++) {\n855\t            newRenderedIndices.add(i);\n856\t        }\n857\t\n858\t        var fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();\n859\t        newRenderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n860\t            if (!state.virtualization.renderedIndices.has(index)) {\n861\t                var event = state.events[index];\n862\t                if (event) {\n863\t                    var tempDiv = document.createElement('div');\n864\t                    tempDiv.innerHTML = renderEvent(event, false, index);\n865\t                    var newEventEl = tempDiv.firstElementChild;\n866\t                    if (newEventEl) {\n867\t                        newEventEl.dataset.index = index;\n868\t                        fragment.appendChild(newEventEl);\n869\t                    }\n870\t                }\n871\t            }\n872\t        });\n873\t\n874\t        if (fragment.children.length > 0) {\n875\t            elements.eventsContainer.appendChild(fragment);\n876\t            Array.from(fragment.children).forEach(function(item) {\n877\t                bindEventHandlers(item);\n878\t                if (state.virtualization.observer) {\n879\t                    state.virtualization.observer.observe(item);\n880\t                }\n881\t            });\n882\t        }\n883\t\n884\t        state.virtualization.renderedIndices.forEach(function(index) {\n885\t            if (!newRenderedIndices.has(index)) {\n886\t                var item = elements.eventsContainer.querySelector('[data-index=\"' + index + '\"]');\n887\t                if (item) {\n888\t                    if (state.virtualization.observer) {\n889\t                        state.virtualization.observer.unobserve(item);\n890\t                    }\n891\t                    item.remove();\n892\t                }\n893\t            }\n894\t        });\n895\t\n896\t        state.virtualization.renderedIndices = newRenderedIndices;\n897\t        updateSpacers();\n898\t    }\n899\t\n900\t    function updateSpacers() {\n901\t        if (!elements.spacerTop || !elements.spacerBottom) return;\n902\t        var topHeight = state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n903\t        var bottomHeight = (state.events.length - state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex - 1) * CONFIG.itemHeight;\n904\t        elements.spacerTop.style.height = Math.max(0, topHeight) + 'px';\n905\t        elements.spacerBottom.style.height = Math.max(0, bottomHeight) + 'px';\n906\t    }\n907\t\n908\t    // ============================================\n909\t    // Rendering\n910\t    // ============================================\n911\t    function renderEvents() {\n912\t        if (!elements.eventsContainer) return;\n913\t\n914\t        if (state.events.length === 0) {\n915\t            elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n916\t            if (elements.empty) elements.empty.style.display = 'flex';\n917\t            if (elements.loading) elements.loading.style.display = 'none';\n918\t            updateCountDisplay();\n919\t            return;\n920\t        }\n921\t\n922\t        if (elements.empty) elements.empty.style.display = 'none';\n923\t        if (elements.loading) elements.loading.style.display = 'none';\n924\t\n925\t        // Reset virtualization state on re-render\n926\t        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = 0;\n927\t        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = 0;\n928\t        state.virtualization.renderedIndices = new Set();\n929\t\n930\t        if (CONFIG.virtualization.enabled && state.events.length > CONFIG.maxDOMItems) {\n931\t            renderVirtualized();\n932\t        } else {\n933\t            renderAll();\n934\t        }\n935\t\n936\t        updateCountDisplay();\n937\t    }\n938\t\n939\t    function renderAll() {\n940\t        var html = '';\n941\t        state.events.forEach(function(event, index) {\n942\t            html += renderEvent(event, false, index);\n943\t        });\n944\t        elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = html;\n945\t\n946\t        Array.from(elements.eventsContainer.children).forEach(function(item) {\n947\t            bindEventHandlers(item);\n948\t        });\n949\t    }\n950\t\n951\t    function renderVirtualized() {\n952\t        elements.eventsContainer.innerHTML = '';\n953\t\n954\t        var containerHeight = elements.content.clientHeight || 400;\n955\t        var visibleCount = Math.ceil(containerHeight / CONFIG.itemHeight);\n956\t        var bufferCount = CONFIG.virtualization.bufferSize;\n957\t\n958\t        state.virtualization.firstVisibleIndex = 0;\n959\t        state.virtualization.lastVisibleIndex = Math.min(state.events.length - 1, visibleCount + bufferCount * 2);\n960\t\n961\t        updateSpacers();\n962\t        updateRenderedRange();\n963\t    }\n964\t\n965\t    function renderEvent(event, isNew, index) {\n966\t        var typeInfo = EVENT_TYPES[event.type] || EVENT_TYPES.system;\n967\t        var timeStr = formatTimestamp(event.timestamp_ms);\n968\t        var description = buildEventDescription(event, typeInfo);\n969\t\n970\t        var severityClass = (event.severity === 'alert' || event.severity === 'critical') ?
